authors_text: Zhuo Wang,Zezheng Wang,Zitong Yu,Weihong Deng,Jiahong Li,Tingting Gao,Zhongyuan Wang
title: Domain Generalization via Shuffled Style Assembly for Face Anti-Spoofing
title_zh: 通过混洗式组装进行域泛化以实现人脸反欺骗
abstract: With diverse presentation attacks emerging continually, generalizable face anti-spoofing (FAS) has drawn growing attention. Most existing methods implement domain generalization (DG) on the complete representations. However, different image statistics may have unique properties for the FAS tasks. In this work, we separate the complete representation into content and style ones. A novel Shuffled Style Assembly Network (SSAN) is proposed to extract and reassemble different content and style features for a stylized feature space. Then, to obtain a generalized representation, a contrastive learning strategy is developed to emphasize liveness-related style information while suppress the domain-specific one. Finally, the representations of the correct assemblies are used to distinguish between living and spoofing during the inferring. On the other hand, despite the decent performance, there still exists a gap between academia and industry, due to the difference in data quantity and distribution. Thus, a new large-scale benchmark for FAS is built up to further evaluate the performance of algorithms in reality. Both qualitative and quantitative results on existing and proposed benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods. The codes will be available at https://github.com/wangzhuo2019/SSAN.
summary: With diverse presentation attacks emerging continually, generalizable face anti-spoofing (FAS) has drawn growing attention. Most existing methods implement domain generalization (DG) on the complete representations. However, different image statistics may have unique properties for the FAS tasks. In this work, we separate the complete representation into content and style ones. A novel Shuffled Style Assembly Network (SSAN) is proposed to extract and reassemble different content and style features for a stylized feature space. Then, to obtain a generalized representation, a contrastive learning strategy is developed to emphasize liveness-related style information while suppress the domain-specific one. Finally, the representations of the correct assemblies are used to distinguish between living and spoofing during the inferring. On the other hand, despite the decent performance, there still exists a gap between academia and industry, due to the difference in data quantity and distribution. Thus, a new large-scale benchmark for FAS is built up to further evaluate the performance of algorithms in reality. Both qualitative and quantitative results on existing and proposed benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods. The codes will be available at https://github.com/wangzhuo2019/SSAN.
abstract_zh: 随着多样化的呈现攻击不断出现，通用人脸反欺骗（FAS）引起了越来越多的关注。大多数现有方法在完整表示上实现域泛化（DG）。然而，不同的图像统计数据对于 FAS 任务可能具有独特的属性。在这项工作中，我们将完整的表示分为内容和风格。提出了一种新颖的混洗风格组装网络（SSAN）来提取和重新组装风格化特征空间的不同内容和风格特征。然后，为了获得广义表示，开发了一种对比学习策略来强调与活跃度相关的风格信息，同时抑制特定领域的风格信息。最后，在推理过程中，正确组件的表示用于区分实时组件和欺骗组件。另一方面，尽管表现不错，但由于数据数量和分布的差异，学术界和工业界之间仍然存在差距。因此，建立了一个新的FAS大规模基准，以进一步评估算法在现实中的性能。现有和拟议基准的定性和定量结果都证明了我们方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/wangzhuo2019/SSAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过混合风格重组实现域泛化的新型人脸反欺骗方法SSAN，并构建了大规模基准数据集以提升算法实际应用效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在完整特征表示上进行域泛化，未能充分考虑人脸反欺骗任务中内容与风格特征的差异性，导致跨域泛化能力不足且学术与工业界存在性能差距。
AI.method: 设计SSAN网络分离内容与风格特征，通过混合重组构建风格化特征空间；采用对比学习策略强化活体相关风格特征并抑制领域特异性信息；构建包含真实攻击样本的大规模基准数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在现有及新构建的基准数据集上均取得优于现有方法的定量与定性结果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SSAN通过解耦特征空间并优化风格表示有效提升了域泛化能力，新数据集为算法实际应用评估提供了更可靠的基准。

authors_text: Yusuke Nagata,Jinki Otao,Daichi Haraguchi,Seiichi Uchida
title: TrueType Transformer: Character and Font Style Recognition in Outline Format
title_zh: TrueType Transformer：大纲格式的字符和字体样式识别
abstract: We propose TrueType Transformer (T3), which can perform character and font style recognition in an outline format. The outline format, such as TrueType, represents each character as a sequence of control points of stroke contours and is frequently used in born-digital documents. T3 is organized by a deep neural network, so-called Transformer. Transformer is originally proposed for sequential data, such as text, and therefore appropriate for handling the outline data. In other words, T3 directly accepts the outline data without converting it into a bitmap image. Consequently, T3 realizes a resolution-independent classification. Moreover, since the locations of the control points represent the fine and local structures of the font style, T3 is suitable for font style classification, where such structures are very important. In this paper, we experimentally show the applicability of T3 in character and font style recognition tasks, while observing how the individual control points contribute to classification results.
summary: We propose TrueType Transformer (T3), which can perform character and font style recognition in an outline format. The outline format, such as TrueType, represents each character as a sequence of control points of stroke contours and is frequently used in born-digital documents. T3 is organized by a deep neural network, so-called Transformer. Transformer is originally proposed for sequential data, such as text, and therefore appropriate for handling the outline data. In other words, T3 directly accepts the outline data without converting it into a bitmap image. Consequently, T3 realizes a resolution-independent classification. Moreover, since the locations of the control points represent the fine and local structures of the font style, T3 is suitable for font style classification, where such structures are very important. In this paper, we experimentally show the applicability of T3 in character and font style recognition tasks, while observing how the individual control points contribute to classification results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 TrueType Transformer (T3)，它可以以轮廓格式执行字符和字体样式识别。轮廓格式（例如 TrueType）将每个字符表示为笔划轮廓控制点的序列，并且经常用于原生数字文档中。 T3 由深度神经网络（即所谓的 Transformer）组织而成。 Transformer 最初是针对顺序数据（例如文本）提出的，因此适合处理轮廓数据。换句话说，T3直接接受轮廓数据，而不将其转换为位图图像。因此，T3 实现了与分辨率无关的分类。此外，由于控制点的位置代表了字体风格的精细和局部结构，因此T3适合字体风格分类，其中这种结构非常重要。在本文中，我们通过实验展示了 T3 在字符和字体样式识别任务中的适用性，同时观察各个控制点对分类结果的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的模型T3，用于直接在轮廓格式（如TrueType）中进行字符和字体风格识别，无需转换为位图。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需将轮廓数据转换为位图进行识别，导致分辨率依赖性，而字体风格分类需要细粒度局部结构信息，现有方法难以有效捕捉。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的深度神经网络T3，直接处理轮廓数据中的控制点序列，利用Transformer对序列数据的处理能力实现分辨率无关的分类。
AI.result: 实验验证了T3在字符识别和字体风格分类任务中的有效性，并分析了控制点对分类结果的贡献。
AI.conclusion: T3通过直接处理轮廓数据，实现了高效且分辨率无关的字符与字体风格识别，突显了控制点在字体特征提取中的重要性。

The outline format, such as TrueType, represents each character as a sequence of control points of stroke contours and is frequently used in born-digital documents. authors_text: Yaogong Feng,Xiaowen Huang,Pengbo Yang,Jian Yu,Jitao Sang
title: Non-generative Generalized Zero-shot Learning via Task-correlated Disentanglement and Controllable Samples Synthesis
title_zh: 通过任务相关解缠和可控样本合成的非生成广义零样本学习
abstract: Synthesizing pseudo samples is currently the most effective way to solve the Generalized Zero-Shot Learning (GZSL) problem. Most models achieve competitive performance but still suffer from two problems: (1) Feature confounding, the overall representations confound task-correlated and task-independent features, and existing models disentangle them in a generative way, but they are unreasonable to synthesize reliable pseudo samples with limited samples; (2) Distribution uncertainty, that massive data is needed when existing models synthesize samples from the uncertain distribution, which causes poor performance in limited samples of seen classes. In this paper, we propose a non-generative model to address these problems correspondingly in two modules: (1) Task-correlated feature disentanglement, to exclude the task-correlated features from task-independent ones by adversarial learning of domain adaption towards reasonable synthesis; (2) Controllable pseudo sample synthesis, to synthesize edge-pseudo and center-pseudo samples with certain characteristics towards more diversity generated and intuitive transfer. In addation, to describe the new scene that is the limit seen class samples in the training process, we further formulate a new ZSL task named the 'Few-shot Seen class and Zero-shot Unseen class learning' (FSZU). Extensive experiments on four benchmarks verify that the proposed method is competitive in the GZSL and the FSZU tasks.
summary: Synthesizing pseudo samples is currently the most effective way to solve the Generalized Zero-Shot Learning (GZSL) problem. Most models achieve competitive performance but still suffer from two problems: (1) Feature confounding, the overall representations confound task-correlated and task-independent features, and existing models disentangle them in a generative way, but they are unreasonable to synthesize reliable pseudo samples with limited samples; (2) Distribution uncertainty, that massive data is needed when existing models synthesize samples from the uncertain distribution, which causes poor performance in limited samples of seen classes. In this paper, we propose a non-generative model to address these problems correspondingly in two modules: (1) Task-correlated feature disentanglement, to exclude the task-correlated features from task-independent ones by adversarial learning of domain adaption towards reasonable synthesis; (2) Controllable pseudo sample synthesis, to synthesize edge-pseudo and center-pseudo samples with certain characteristics towards more diversity generated and intuitive transfer. In addation, to describe the new scene that is the limit seen class samples in the training process, we further formulate a new ZSL task named the 'Few-shot Seen class and Zero-shot Unseen class learning' (FSZU). Extensive experiments on four benchmarks verify that the proposed method is competitive in the GZSL and the FSZU tasks.
abstract_zh: 合成伪样本是目前解决广义零样本学习（GZSL）问题最有效的方法。大多数模型取得了有竞争力的性能，但仍然存在两个问题：（1）特征混杂，整体表示混淆了任务相关和任务无关的特征，现有模型以生成方式将它们解开，但不合理地用有限的样本合成可靠的伪样本； (2)分布不确定性，现有模型在合成不确定分布的样本时需要大量数据，这导致在可见类别的有限样本中表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种非生成模型来在两个模块中相应地解决这些问题：（1）任务相关特征解缠，通过领域适应的对抗性学习以实现合理合成，从任务无关特征中排除任务相关特征； (2)可控伪样本合成，合成具有一定特征的边缘伪样本和中心伪样本，以实现更多样化的生成和直观的传递。此外，为了描述训练过程中限制可见类样本的新场景，我们进一步制定了一个新的 ZSL 任务，名为“少样本可见类和零样本未见类学习”（FSZU）。对四个基准的大量实验验证了所提出的方法在 GZSL 和 FSZU 任务中具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非生成式广义零样本学习方法，通过任务相关特征解耦和可控伪样本合成解决现有模型的特征混淆和分布不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式GZSL模型在有限样本下存在特征混淆和分布不确定性问题，导致伪样本合成效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计任务相关特征解耦模块（对抗学习分离任务相关与无关特征）和可控伪样本合成模块（生成边缘/中心伪样本），并提出新任务FSZU以应对有限样本场景。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上验证了方法在GZSL和FSZU任务中的竞争力，优于现有生成式模型。
AI.conclusion: 非生成式框架有效解决了特征混淆和分布不确定性问题，为小样本场景下的零样本学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Non-generative Generalized Zero-shot Learning via Task-correlated Disentanglement and Controllable Samples Synthesis 通过任务相关解缠和可控样本合成的非生成广义零样本学习 Synthesizing pseudo samples is currently the most effective way to solve the Generalized Zero-Shot Learning (GZSL) problem. Most models achieve competitive performance but still suffer from two problems: (1) Feature confounding, the overall representations confound task-correlated and task-independent features, and existing models disentangle them in a generative way, but they are unreasonable to synthesize reliable pseudo samples with limited samples; (2) Distribution uncertainty, that massive data is needed when existing models synthesize samples from the uncertain distribution, which causes poor performance in limited samples of seen classes. In this paper, we propose a non-generative model to address these problems correspondingly in two modules: (1) Task-correlated feature disentanglement, to exclude the task-correlated features from task-independent ones by adversarial learning of domain adaption towards reasonable synthesis; (2) Controllable pseudo sample synthesis, to synthesize edge-pseudo and center-pseudo samples with certain characteristics towards more diversity generated and intuitive transfer. In addation, to describe the new scene that is the limit seen class samples in the training process, we further formulate a new ZSL task named the 'Few-shot Seen class and Zero-shot Unseen class learning' (FSZU). Extensive experiments on four benchmarks verify that the proposed method is competitive in the GZSL and the FSZU tasks. 合成伪样本是目前解决广义零样本学习（GZSL）问题最有效的方法。大多数模型取得了有竞争力的性能，但仍然存在两个问题：（1）特征混杂，整体表示混淆了任务相关和任务无关的特征，现有模型以生成方式将它们解开，但不合理地用有限的样本合成可靠的伪样本； (2)分布不确定性，现有模型在合成不确定分布的样本时需要大量数据，这导致在可见类别的有限样本中表现不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种非生成模型来在两个模块中相应地解决这些问题：（1）任务相关特征解缠，通过领域适应的对抗性学习以实现合理合成，从任务无关特征中排除任务相关特征； (2)可控伪样本合成，合成具有一定特征的边缘伪样本和中心伪样本，以实现更多样化的生成和直观的传递。此外，为了描述训练过程中限制可见类样本的新场景，我们进一步制定了一个新的 ZSL 任务，名为“少样本可见类和零样本未见类学习”（FSZU）。对四个基准的大量实验验证了所提出的方法在 GZSL 和 FSZU 任务中具有竞争力。 本文提出一种非生成式广义零样本学习方法，通过任务相关特征解耦和可控伪样本合成解决现有模型的特征混淆和分布不确定性问题。 Yaogong Feng,Xiaowen Huang,Pengbo Yang,Jian Yu,Jitao Sang cs.CV

authors_text: Manuel Stoiber,Martin Sundermeyer,Rudolph Triebel
title: Iterative Corresponding Geometry: Fusing Region and Depth for Highly Efficient 3D Tracking of Textureless Objects
title_zh: 迭代对应几何：融合区域和深度，实现无纹理对象的高效 3D 跟踪
abstract: Tracking objects in 3D space and predicting their 6DoF pose is an essential task in computer vision. State-of-the-art approaches often rely on object texture to tackle this problem. However, while they achieve impressive results, many objects do not contain sufficient texture, violating the main underlying assumption. In the following, we thus propose ICG, a novel probabilistic tracker that fuses region and depth information and only requires the object geometry. Our method deploys correspondence lines and points to iteratively refine the pose. We also implement robust occlusion handling to improve performance in real-world settings. Experiments on the YCB-Video, OPT, and Choi datasets demonstrate that, even for textured objects, our approach outperforms the current state of the art with respect to accuracy and robustness. At the same time, ICG shows fast convergence and outstanding efficiency, requiring only 1.3 ms per frame on a single CPU core. Finally, we analyze the influence of individual components and discuss our performance compared to deep learning-based methods. The source code of our tracker is publicly available.
summary: Tracking objects in 3D space and predicting their 6DoF pose is an essential task in computer vision. State-of-the-art approaches often rely on object texture to tackle this problem. However, while they achieve impressive results, many objects do not contain sufficient texture, violating the main underlying assumption. In the following, we thus propose ICG, a novel probabilistic tracker that fuses region and depth information and only requires the object geometry. Our method deploys correspondence lines and points to iteratively refine the pose. We also implement robust occlusion handling to improve performance in real-world settings. Experiments on the YCB-Video, OPT, and Choi datasets demonstrate that, even for textured objects, our approach outperforms the current state of the art with respect to accuracy and robustness. At the same time, ICG shows fast convergence and outstanding efficiency, requiring only 1.3 ms per frame on a single CPU core. Finally, we analyze the influence of individual components and discuss our performance compared to deep learning-based methods. The source code of our tracker is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 跟踪 3D 空间中的物体并预测其 6DoF 姿态是计算机视觉中的一项基本任务。最先进的方法通常依靠对象纹理来解决这个问题。然而，虽然它们取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但许多物体不包含足够的纹理，违反了主要的基本假设。因此，在下文中，我们提出了 ICG，一种融合区域和深度信息并且仅需要对象几何形状的新型概率跟踪器。我们的方法部署对应线和点来迭代地完善姿势。我们还实施了强大的遮挡处理来提高现实环境中的性能。 YCB-Video、OPT 和 Choi 数据集上的实验表明，即使对于纹理对象，我们的方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面也优于当前最先进的技术。同时，ICG 表现出快速收敛和出色的效率，在单个 CPU 核上每帧仅需要 1.3 毫秒。最后，我们分析各个组件的影响，并讨论我们与基于深度学习的方法的性能比较。我们的跟踪器的源代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ICG的概率跟踪器，用于高效跟踪无纹理物体的3D姿态，通过融合区域和深度信息实现高精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖物体纹理进行3D跟踪，但许多物体缺乏足够纹理，导致方法失效。因此需开发不依赖纹理、仅利用几何信息的跟踪方案。
AI.method: ICG通过迭代对应线和点精炼姿态，融合区域与深度信息，并引入鲁棒的遮挡处理机制，仅需物体几何信息即可实现高效跟踪。
AI.result: 在YCB-Video、OPT和Choi数据集上，ICG在精度和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，且单核CPU下每帧仅需1.3ms，效率突出。
AI.conclusion: ICG为无纹理及有纹理物体提供了高效、精确的3D跟踪方案，验证了几何信息融合的有效性，且代码开源便于应用验证。

authors_text: Desmond Caulley,Yufeng Yang,David Anderson
title: EACELEB: An East Asian Language Speaking Celebrity Dataset for Speaker Recognition
title_zh: EACELEB：用于说话人识别的东亚语言名人数据集
abstract: Large datasets are very useful for training speaker recognition systems, and various research groups have constructed several over the years. Voxceleb is a large dataset for speaker recognition that is extracted from Youtube videos. This paper presents an audio-visual method for acquiring audio data from Youtube given the speaker's name as input. The system follows a pipeline similar to that of the Voxceleb data acquisition method. However, our work focuses on fast data acquisition by using face-tracking in subsequent frames once a face has been detected -- this is preferable over face detection for every frame considering its computational cost. We show that applying audio diarization to our data after acquiring it can yield equal error rates comparable to Voxceleb. A secondary set of experiments showed that we could further decrease the error rate by fine-tuning a pre-trained x-vector system with the acquired data. Like Voxceleb, the work here focuses primarily on developing audio for celebrities. However, unlike Voxceleb, our target audio data is from celebrities in East Asian countries. Finally, we set up a speaker verification task to evaluate the accuracy of our acquired data. After diarization and fine-tuning, we achieved an equal error rate of approximately 4\% across our entire dataset.
summary: Large datasets are very useful for training speaker recognition systems, and various research groups have constructed several over the years. Voxceleb is a large dataset for speaker recognition that is extracted from Youtube videos. This paper presents an audio-visual method for acquiring audio data from Youtube given the speaker's name as input. The system follows a pipeline similar to that of the Voxceleb data acquisition method. However, our work focuses on fast data acquisition by using face-tracking in subsequent frames once a face has been detected -- this is preferable over face detection for every frame considering its computational cost. We show that applying audio diarization to our data after acquiring it can yield equal error rates comparable to Voxceleb. A secondary set of experiments showed that we could further decrease the error rate by fine-tuning a pre-trained x-vector system with the acquired data. Like Voxceleb, the work here focuses primarily on developing audio for celebrities. However, unlike Voxceleb, our target audio data is from celebrities in East Asian countries. Finally, we set up a speaker verification task to evaluate the accuracy of our acquired data. After diarization and fine-tuning, we achieved an equal error rate of approximately 4\% across our entire dataset.
abstract_zh: 大型数据集对于训练说话人识别系统非常有用，多年来各个研究小组已经构建了多个数据集。 Voxceleb 是从 Youtube 视频中提取的用于说话人识别的大型数据集。本文提出了一种视听方法，用于从 Youtube 获取音频数据，并将演讲者的姓名作为输入。该系统遵循与 Voxceleb 数据采集方法类似的流程。然而，我们的工作重点是在检测到面部后在后续帧中使用面部跟踪来快速获取数据——考虑到其计算成本，这比每帧的面部检测更可取。我们证明，在获取数据后对其应用音频二值化可以产生与 Voxceleb 相当的错误率。第二组实验表明，我们可以通过使用获取的数据微调预训练的 x 向量系统来进一步降低错误率。与 Voxceleb 一样，这里的工作主要致力于为名人开发音频。然而，与 Voxceleb 不同的是，我们的目标音频数据来自东亚国家的名人。最后，我们设置了一个说话者验证任务来评估我们获取的数据的准确性。经过二值化和微调后，我们在整个数据集中实现了大约 4% 的相同错误率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EACELEB数据集，专门用于东亚语言演讲者的说话人识别研究，并介绍了一种高效的音频-视觉数据采集方法。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人识别数据集（如Voxceleb）主要针对英语演讲者，缺乏针对东亚语言的高质量数据，限制了相关研究的进展。
AI.method: 采用类似Voxceleb的管道，通过输入演讲者姓名从YouTube获取数据，利用帧间人脸跟踪降低计算成本，并结合音频分段和x-vector模型微调优化数据。
AI.result: 在完成音频分段和模型微调后，整个数据集的等错误率（EER）达到约4%，性能与Voxceleb相当。
AI.conclusion: EACELEB为东亚语言说话人识别提供了高质量数据支持，验证了该数据采集方法的有效性，并为后续研究奠定了基础。

method: 采用类似Voxceleb的管道，通过输入演讲者姓名从YouTube获取数据，利用帧间人脸跟踪降低计算成本，并结合音频分段和x-vector模型微调优化数据。
result: 在完成音频分段和模型微调后，整个数据集的等错误率（EER）达到约4%，性能与Voxceleb相当。
conclusion: EACELEB为东亚语言说话人识别提供了高质量数据支持，验证了该数据采集方法的有效性，并为后续研究奠定了基础。
search_text: EACELEB: An East Asian Language Speaking Celebrity Dataset for Speaker Recognition EACELEB：用于说话人识别的东亚语言名人数据集 Large datasets are very useful for training speaker recognition systems, and various research groups have constructed several over the years. Voxceleb is a large dataset for speaker recognition that is extracted from Youtube videos. This paper presents an audio-visual method for acquiring audio data from Youtube given the speaker's name as input. The system follows a pipeline similar to that of the Voxceleb data acquisition method. However, our work focuses on fast data acquisition by using face-tracking in subsequent frames once a face has been detected -- this is preferable over face detection for every frame considering its computational cost. We show that applying audio diarization to our data after acquiring it can yield equal error rates comparable to Voxceleb. A secondary set of experiments showed that we could further decrease the error rate by fine-tuning a pre-trained x-vector system with the acquired data. Like Voxceleb, the work here focuses primarily on developing audio for celebrities. However, unlike Voxceleb, our target audio data is from celebrities in East Asian countries. Finally, we set up a speaker verification task to evaluate the accuracy of our acquired data. After diarization and fine-tuning, we achieved an equal error rate of approximately 4\% across our entire dataset. 大型数据集对于训练说话人识别系统非常有用，多年来各个研究小组已经构建了多个数据集。 Voxceleb 是从 Youtube 视频中提取的用于说话人识别的大型数据集。本文提出了一种视听方法，用于从 Youtube 获取音频数据，并将演讲者的姓名作为输入。该系统遵循与 Voxceleb 数据采集方法类似的流程。然而，我们的工作重点是在检测到面部后在后续帧中使用面部跟踪来快速获取数据——考虑到其计算成本，这比每帧的面部检测更可取。我们证明，在获取数据后对其应用音频二值化可以产生与 Voxceleb 相当的错误率。第二组实验表明，我们可以通过使用获取的数据微调预训练的 x 向量系统来进一步降低错误率。与 Voxceleb 一样，这里的工作主要致力于为名人开发音频。然而，与 Voxceleb 不同的是，我们的目标音频数据来自东亚国家的名人。最后，我们设置了一个说话者验证任务来评估我们获取的数据的准确性。经过二值化和微调后，我们在整个数据集中实现了大约 4% 的相同错误率。 本文提出EACELEB数据集，专门用于东亚语言演讲者的说话人识别研究，并介绍了一种高效的音频-视觉数据采集方法。 Desmond Caulley,Yufeng Yang,David Anderson cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Jaehoon Choi,Dongki Jung,Yonghan Lee,Deokhwa Kim,Dinesh Manocha,Donghwan Lee
title: SelfTune: Metrically Scaled Monocular Depth Estimation through Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: SelfTune：通过自我监督学习进行度量尺度的单目深度估计
abstract: Monocular depth estimation in the wild inherently predicts depth up to an unknown scale. To resolve scale ambiguity issue, we present a learning algorithm that leverages monocular simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) with proprioceptive sensors. Such monocular SLAM systems can provide metrically scaled camera poses. Given these metric poses and monocular sequences, we propose a self-supervised learning method for the pre-trained supervised monocular depth networks to enable metrically scaled depth estimation. Our approach is based on a teacher-student formulation which guides our network to predict high-quality depths. We demonstrate that our approach is useful for various applications such as mobile robot navigation and is applicable to diverse environments. Our full system shows improvements over recent self-supervised depth estimation and completion methods on EuRoC, OpenLORIS, and ScanNet datasets.
summary: Monocular depth estimation in the wild inherently predicts depth up to an unknown scale. To resolve scale ambiguity issue, we present a learning algorithm that leverages monocular simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) with proprioceptive sensors. Such monocular SLAM systems can provide metrically scaled camera poses. Given these metric poses and monocular sequences, we propose a self-supervised learning method for the pre-trained supervised monocular depth networks to enable metrically scaled depth estimation. Our approach is based on a teacher-student formulation which guides our network to predict high-quality depths. We demonstrate that our approach is useful for various applications such as mobile robot navigation and is applicable to diverse environments. Our full system shows improvements over recent self-supervised depth estimation and completion methods on EuRoC, OpenLORIS, and ScanNet datasets.
abstract_zh: 野外的单目深度估计本质上可以预测未知尺度的深度。为了解决尺度模糊问题，我们提出了一种学习算法，该算法利用带有本体感受传感器的单目同步定位和建图（SLAM）。这种单目 SLAM 系统可以提供按度量缩放的相机姿势。给定这些度量姿势和单目序列，我们为预训练的监督单目深度网络提出了一种自监督学习方法，以实现度量缩放的深度估计。我们的方法基于师生公式，指导我们的网络预测高质量的深度。我们证明我们的方法对于移动机器人导航等各种应用都很有用，并且适用于不同的环境。我们的完整系统显示了对 EuRoC、OpenLORIS 和 ScanNet 数据集的最新自监督深度估计和完成方法的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的单目深度估计方法，通过结合单目SLAM系统解决深度尺度不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计在真实场景中因缺乏尺度参考导致预测结果不可比，传统监督学习依赖标注数据且难以适应复杂环境。
AI.method: 利用单目SLAM获取度量尺度的相机位姿，设计教师-学生框架对预训练深度网络进行自监督微调，通过光流约束实现尺度对齐。
AI.result: 在EuRoC、OpenLORIS和ScanNet数据集上优于最新自监督方法，适用于移动机器人导航等实际场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了单目深度估计的尺度问题，在保持模型泛化能力的同时提升了深度预测的度量准确性。

authors_text: Boyu Chen,Peixia Li,Lei Bai,Lei Qiao,Qiuhong Shen,Bo Li,Weihao Gan,Wei Wu,Wanli Ouyang
title: Backbone is All Your Need: A Simplified Architecture for Visual Object Tracking
title_zh: Backbone 满足您的所有需求：视觉对象跟踪的简化架构
abstract: Exploiting a general-purpose neural architecture to replace hand-wired designs or inductive biases has recently drawn extensive interest. However, existing tracking approaches rely on customized sub-modules and need prior knowledge for architecture selection, hindering the tracking development in a more general system. This paper presents a Simplified Tracking architecture (SimTrack) by leveraging a transformer backbone for joint feature extraction and interaction. Unlike existing Siamese trackers, we serialize the input images and concatenate them directly before the one-branch backbone. Feature interaction in the backbone helps to remove well-designed interaction modules and produce a more efficient and effective framework. To reduce the information loss from down-sampling in vision transformers, we further propose a foveal window strategy, providing more diverse input patches with acceptable computational costs. Our SimTrack improves the baseline with 2.5%/2.6% AUC gains on LaSOT/TNL2K and gets results competitive with other specialized tracking algorithms without bells and whistles.
summary: Exploiting a general-purpose neural architecture to replace hand-wired designs or inductive biases has recently drawn extensive interest. However, existing tracking approaches rely on customized sub-modules and need prior knowledge for architecture selection, hindering the tracking development in a more general system. This paper presents a Simplified Tracking architecture (SimTrack) by leveraging a transformer backbone for joint feature extraction and interaction. Unlike existing Siamese trackers, we serialize the input images and concatenate them directly before the one-branch backbone. Feature interaction in the backbone helps to remove well-designed interaction modules and produce a more efficient and effective framework. To reduce the information loss from down-sampling in vision transformers, we further propose a foveal window strategy, providing more diverse input patches with acceptable computational costs. Our SimTrack improves the baseline with 2.5%/2.6% AUC gains on LaSOT/TNL2K and gets results competitive with other specialized tracking algorithms without bells and whistles.
abstract_zh: 利用通用神经架构来取代手工设计或归纳偏差最近引起了广泛的兴趣。然而，现有的跟踪方法依赖于定制的子模块，并且需要先验知识来进行架构选择，这阻碍了更通用系统中的跟踪开发。本文提出了一种简化跟踪架构（SimTrack），利用变压器骨干进行联合特征提取和交互。与现有的 Siamese 跟踪器不同，我们序列化输入图像并将它们直接连接到单分支主干之前。主干中的功能交互有助于去除设计良好的交互模块并产生更高效和有效的框架。为了减少视觉变换器中下采样的信息损失，我们进一步提出了一种中心凹窗口策略，以可接受的计算成本提供更多样化的输入补丁。我们的 SimTrack 在 LaSOT/TNL2K 上使基线提高了 2.5%/2.6% AUC，并且获得的结果与其他没有附加功能的专业跟踪算法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简化视觉目标跟踪的架构SimTrack，利用Transformer主干网络实现特征提取与交互，无需复杂模块设计。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪方法依赖定制化子模块和先验知识，限制了通用系统的开发。作者旨在通过通用神经架构替代手工设计模块，提升效率与泛化性。
AI.method: 采用Transformer主干网络进行特征提取与交互，序列化输入图像并直接拼接至主干网络前；引入注视窗口策略缓解下采样信息损失，去除复杂交互模块。
AI.result: 在LaSOT/TNL2K数据集上，SimTrack相较基线提升2.5%/2.6% AUC，且无需额外技巧即可达到其他专用算法的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 简化架构结合Transformer主干可有效实现视觉跟踪，证明通用神经网络在减少设计复杂度的同时保持性能优势。

search_text: Backbone is All Your Need: A Simplified Architecture for Visual Object Tracking Backbone 满足您的所有需求：视觉对象跟踪的简化架构 Exploiting a general-purpose neural architecture to replace hand-wired designs or inductive biases has recently drawn extensive interest. However, existing tracking approaches rely on customized sub-modules and need prior knowledge for architecture selection, hindering the tracking development in a more general system. This paper presents a Simplified Tracking architecture (SimTrack) by leveraging a transformer backbone for joint feature extraction and interaction. Unlike existing Siamese trackers, we serialize the input images and concatenate them directly before the one-branch backbone. Feature interaction in the backbone helps to remove well-designed interaction modules and produce a more efficient and effective framework. To reduce the information loss from down-sampling in vision transformers, we further propose a foveal window strategy, providing more diverse input patches with acceptable computational costs. Our SimTrack improves the baseline with 2.5%/2.6% AUC gains on LaSOT/TNL2K and gets results competitive with other specialized tracking algorithms without bells and whistles. 利用通用神经架构来取代手工设计或归纳偏差最近引起了广泛的兴趣。然而，现有的跟踪方法依赖于定制的子模块，并且需要先验知识来进行架构选择，这阻碍了更通用系统中的跟踪开发。本文提出了一种简化跟踪架构（SimTrack），利用变压器骨干进行联合特征提取和交互。与现有的 Siamese 跟踪器不同，我们序列化输入图像并将它们直接连接到单分支主干之前。主干中的功能交互有助于去除设计良好的交互模块并产生更高效和有效的框架。为了减少视觉变换器中下采样的信息损失，我们进一步提出了一种中心凹窗口策略，以可接受的计算成本提供更多样化的输入补丁。我们的 SimTrack 在 LaSOT/TNL2K 上使基线提高了 2.5%/2.6% AUC，并且获得的结果与其他没有附加功能的专业跟踪算法具有竞争力。 本文提出了一种简化视觉目标跟踪的架构SimTrack，利用Transformer主干网络实现特征提取与交互，无需复杂模块设计。 Boyu Chen,Peixia Li,Lei Bai,Lei Qiao,Qiuhong Shen,Bo Li,Weihao Gan,Wei Wu,Wanli Ouyang cs.CV

authors_text: Nicholas Popovic,Walter Laurito,Michael Färber
title: AIFB-WebScience at SemEval-2022 Task 12: Relation Extraction First -- Using Relation Extraction to Identify Entities
title_zh: AIFB-WebScience at SemEval-2022 任务 12：关系提取优先——使用关系提取来识别实体
abstract: In this paper, we present an end-to-end joint entity and relation extraction approach based on transformer-based language models. We apply the model to the task of linking mathematical symbols to their descriptions in LaTeX documents. In contrast to existing approaches, which perform entity and relation extraction in sequence, our system incorporates information from relation extraction into entity extraction. This means that the system can be trained even on data sets where only a subset of all valid entity spans is annotated. We provide an extensive evaluation of the proposed system and its strengths and weaknesses. Our approach, which can be scaled dynamically in computational complexity at inference time, produces predictions with high precision and reaches 3rd place in the leaderboard of SemEval-2022 Task 12. For inputs in the domain of physics and math, it achieves high relation extraction macro F1 scores of 95.43% and 79.17%, respectively. The code used for training and evaluating our models is available at: https://github.com/nicpopovic/RE1st
summary: In this paper, we present an end-to-end joint entity and relation extraction approach based on transformer-based language models. We apply the model to the task of linking mathematical symbols to their descriptions in LaTeX documents. In contrast to existing approaches, which perform entity and relation extraction in sequence, our system incorporates information from relation extraction into entity extraction. This means that the system can be trained even on data sets where only a subset of all valid entity spans is annotated. We provide an extensive evaluation of the proposed system and its strengths and weaknesses. Our approach, which can be scaled dynamically in computational complexity at inference time, produces predictions with high precision and reaches 3rd place in the leaderboard of SemEval-2022 Task 12. For inputs in the domain of physics and math, it achieves high relation extraction macro F1 scores of 95.43% and 79.17%, respectively. The code used for training and evaluating our models is available at: https://github.com/nicpopovic/RE1st
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变压器语言模型的端到端联合实体和关系提取方法。我们将该模型应用于将数学符号与其在 LaTeX 文档中的描述联系起来的任务。与按顺序执行实体和关系提取的现有方法相比，我们的系统将关系提取中的信息合并到实体提取中。这意味着系统甚至可以在仅注释所有有效实体范围的子集的数据集上进行训练。我们对所提议的系统及其优点和缺点进行了广泛的评估。我们的方法可以在推理时动态调整计算复杂度，产生高精度预测，并在 SemEval-2022 Task 12 排行榜上排名第三。对于物理和数学领域的输入，它分别实现了 95.43% 和 79.17% 的高关系提取宏 F1 分数。用于训练和评估我们的模型的代码位于：https://github.com/nicpopovic/RE1st

AI.motivation: 现有方法通常按顺序进行实体和关系抽取，未能有效利用关系信息，且依赖完整标注的实体数据。本文旨在通过整合关系抽取信息提升实体识别效果，并降低对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的语言模型，采用关系抽取引导实体抽取，动态调整推理时的计算复杂度，实现部分标注数据的训练。
AI.result: 在SemEval-2022 Task 12中排名第三，物理领域关系抽取F1达95.43%，数学领域达79.17%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在精度和灵活性上表现优异，尤其适合数学、物理等需要精确实体关系识别的领域。

search_text: AIFB-WebScience at SemEval-2022 Task 12: Relation Extraction First -- Using Relation Extraction to Identify Entities AIFB-WebScience at SemEval-2022 任务 12：关系提取优先——使用关系提取来识别实体 In this paper, we present an end-to-end joint entity and relation extraction approach based on transformer-based language models. We apply the model to the task of linking mathematical symbols to their descriptions in LaTeX documents. In contrast to existing approaches, which perform entity and relation extraction in sequence, our system incorporates information from relation extraction into entity extraction. This means that the system can be trained even on data sets where only a subset of all valid entity spans is annotated. We provide an extensive evaluation of the proposed system and its strengths and weaknesses. Our approach, which can be scaled dynamically in computational complexity at inference time, produces predictions with high precision and reaches 3rd place in the leaderboard of SemEval-2022 Task 12. For inputs in the domain of physics and math, it achieves high relation extraction macro F1 scores of 95.43% and 79.17%, respectively. The code used for training and evaluating our models is available at: https://github.com/nicpopovic/RE1st 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变压器语言模型的端到端联合实体和关系提取方法。我们将该模型应用于将数学符号与其在 LaTeX 文档中的描述联系起来的任务。与按顺序执行实体和关系提取的现有方法相比，我们的系统将关系提取中的信息合并到实体提取中。这意味着系统甚至可以在仅注释所有有效实体范围的子集的数据集上进行训练。我们对所提议的系统及其优点和缺点进行了广泛的评估。我们的方法可以在推理时动态调整计算复杂度，产生高精度预测，并在 SemEval-2022 Task 12 排行榜上排名第三。对于物理和数学领域的输入，它分别实现了 95.43% 和 79.17% 的高关系提取宏 F1 分数。用于训练和评估我们的模型的代码位于：https://github.com/nicpopovic/RE1st 本文提出一种基于Transformer模型的端到端联合实体与关系抽取方法，用于在LaTeX文档中将数学符号链接到其描述。 Nicholas Popovic,Walter Laurito,Michael Färber cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Dan Ruta,Andrew Gilbert,Pranav Aggarwal,Naveen Marri,Ajinkya Kale,Jo Briggs,Chris Speed,Hailin Jin,Baldo Faieta,Alex Filipkowski,Zhe Lin,John Collomosse
title: StyleBabel: Artistic Style Tagging and Captioning
title_zh: StyleBabel：艺术风格标签和字幕
abstract: We present StyleBabel, a unique open access dataset of natural language captions and free-form tags describing the artistic style of over 135K digital artworks, collected via a novel participatory method from experts studying at specialist art and design schools. StyleBabel was collected via an iterative method, inspired by `Grounded Theory': a qualitative approach that enables annotation while co-evolving a shared language for fine-grained artistic style attribute description. We demonstrate several downstream tasks for StyleBabel, adapting the recent ALADIN architecture for fine-grained style similarity, to train cross-modal embeddings for: 1) free-form tag generation; 2) natural language description of artistic style; 3) fine-grained text search of style. To do so, we extend ALADIN with recent advances in Visual Transformer (ViT) and cross-modal representation learning, achieving a state of the art accuracy in fine-grained style retrieval.
summary: We present StyleBabel, a unique open access dataset of natural language captions and free-form tags describing the artistic style of over 135K digital artworks, collected via a novel participatory method from experts studying at specialist art and design schools. StyleBabel was collected via an iterative method, inspired by `Grounded Theory': a qualitative approach that enables annotation while co-evolving a shared language for fine-grained artistic style attribute description. We demonstrate several downstream tasks for StyleBabel, adapting the recent ALADIN architecture for fine-grained style similarity, to train cross-modal embeddings for: 1) free-form tag generation; 2) natural language description of artistic style; 3) fine-grained text search of style. To do so, we extend ALADIN with recent advances in Visual Transformer (ViT) and cross-modal representation learning, achieving a state of the art accuracy in fine-grained style retrieval.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 StyleBabel，这是一个独特的开放获取数据集，包含自然语言字幕和自由格式标签，描述了超过 135K 数字艺术品的艺术风格，这些数字艺术品通过新颖的参与式方法从专业艺术和设计学校的专家那里收集。 StyleBabel 是通过迭代方法收集的，灵感来自“扎根理论”：一种定性方法，可以在共同进化共享语言以进行细粒度艺术风格属性描述的同时进行注释。我们演示了 StyleBabel 的几个下游任务，采用最新的 ALADIN 架构来实现细粒度的样式相似性，以训练跨模式嵌入：1）自由格式标签生成； 2）艺术风格的自然语言描述； 3）风格的细粒度文本搜索。为此，我们利用 Visual Transformer (ViT) 和跨模式表示学习的最新进展扩展了 ALADIN，在细粒度风格检索方面实现了最先进的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleBabel数据集及相应方法，用于艺术风格的细粒度标签生成、自然语言描述及跨模态检索。
AI.motivation: 现有艺术作品风格描述缺乏细粒度标注和自然语言表达，且跨模态检索效果有限，需构建专业标注数据集并优化模型架构。
AI.method: 采用扎根理论迭代方法收集专家标注，结合ALADIN框架与视觉Transformer，训练跨模态嵌入模型以实现标签生成、风格描述及细粒度检索。
AI.result: 在细粒度艺术风格检索任务中达到最先进准确率，验证了数据集及方法在三个下游任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: StyleBabel为艺术风格分析提供高质量数据集，其跨模态方法推动了细粒度视觉描述与检索技术的发展。

search_text: StyleBabel: Artistic Style Tagging and Captioning StyleBabel：艺术风格标签和字幕 We present StyleBabel, a unique open access dataset of natural language captions and free-form tags describing the artistic style of over 135K digital artworks, collected via a novel participatory method from experts studying at specialist art and design schools. authors_text: Junjie Shen,Ningfei Wang,Ziwen Wan,Yunpeng Luo,Takami Sato,Zhisheng Hu,Xinyang Zhang,Shengjian Guo,Zhenyu Zhong,Kang Li,Ziming Zhao,Chunming Qiao,Qi Alfred Chen
title: SoK: On the Semantic AI Security in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: SoK：论自动驾驶中的语义人工智能安全
abstract: Autonomous Driving (AD) systems rely on AI components to make safety and correct driving decisions. Unfortunately, today's AI algorithms are known to be generally vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, for such AI component-level vulnerabilities to be semantically impactful at the system level, it needs to address non-trivial semantic gaps both (1) from the system-level attack input spaces to those at AI component level, and (2) from AI component-level attack impacts to those at the system level. In this paper, we define such research space as semantic AI security as opposed to generic AI security. Over the past 5 years, increasingly more research works are performed to tackle such semantic AI security challenges in AD context, which has started to show an exponential growth trend. In this paper, we perform the first systematization of knowledge of such growing semantic AD AI security research space. In total, we collect and analyze 53 such papers, and systematically taxonomize them based on research aspects critical for the security field. We summarize 6 most substantial scientific gaps observed based on quantitative comparisons both vertically among existing AD AI security works and horizontally with security works from closely-related domains. With these, we are able to provide insights and potential future directions not only at the design level, but also at the research goal, methodology, and community levels. To address the most critical scientific methodology-level gap, we take the initiative to develop an open-source, uniform, and extensible system-driven evaluation platform, named PASS, for the semantic AD AI security research community. We also use our implemented platform prototype to showcase the capabilities and benefits of such a platform using representative semantic AD AI attacks.
summary: Autonomous Driving (AD) systems rely on AI components to make safety and correct driving decisions. Unfortunately, today's AI algorithms are known to be generally vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, for such AI component-level vulnerabilities to be semantically impactful at the system level, it needs to address non-trivial semantic gaps both (1) from the system-level attack input spaces to those at AI component level, and (2) from AI component-level attack impacts to those at the system level. In this paper, we define such research space as semantic AI security as opposed to generic AI security. Over the past 5 years, increasingly more research works are performed to tackle such semantic AI security challenges in AD context, which has started to show an exponential growth trend. In this paper, we perform the first systematization of knowledge of such growing semantic AD AI security research space. In total, we collect and analyze 53 such papers, and systematically taxonomize them based on research aspects critical for the security field. We summarize 6 most substantial scientific gaps observed based on quantitative comparisons both vertically among existing AD AI security works and horizontally with security works from closely-related domains. With these, we are able to provide insights and potential future directions not only at the design level, but also at the research goal, methodology, and community levels. To address the most critical scientific methodology-level gap, we take the initiative to develop an open-source, uniform, and extensible system-driven evaluation platform, named PASS, for the semantic AD AI security research community. We also use our implemented platform prototype to showcase the capabilities and benefits of such a platform using representative semantic AD AI attacks.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶 (AD) 系统依靠人工智能组件来做出安全和正确的驾驶决策。不幸的是，众所周知，当今的人工智能算法通常容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，为了使此类人工智能组件级漏洞在系统级产生语义影响，需要解决以下两个重要的语义差距：（1）从系统级攻击输入空间到人工智能组件级的攻击输入空间，以及（2）从人工智能组件级攻击影响到系统级的攻击影响。在本文中，我们将此类研究空间定义为语义人工智能安全，而不是通用人工智能安全。在过去的 5 年里，越来越多的研究工作来解决 AD 环境中的此类语义 AI 安全挑战，并开始呈现指数增长趋势。在本文中，我们对这种不断发展的语义 AD 人工智能安全研究领域的知识进行了首次系统化。我们总共收集并分析了 53 篇此类论文，并根据对安全领域至关重要的研究方面对它们进行系统分类。我们根据现有 AD AI 安全工作之间的纵向比较以及与密切相关领域的安全工作的横向比较，总结了观察到的 6 个最重大的科学差距。有了这些，我们不仅能够在设计层面，而且在研究目标、方法论和社区层面提供见解和潜在的未来方向。为了解决最关键的科学方法论层面的差距，我们主动为语义AD人工智能安全研究社区开发了一个开源、统一、可扩展的系统驱动评估平台，名为PASS。我们还使用我们实现的平台原型来展示使用代表性语义 AD AI 攻击的此类平台的功能和优势。

AI.tldr: 本文系统化梳理了自动驾驶领域语义AI安全的研究现状，分析了53篇相关论文并提出开源评估平台PASS。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全研究未充分解决自动驾驶系统中语义层面的攻击输入空间与影响映射问题，需针对性填补该领域知识空白。
AI.method: 通过文献收集与分类、跨领域对比分析、量化评估方法，构建语义AI安全研究框架并开发统一评估平台PASS。
AI.result: 总结出6个关键科学缺口，提出面向设计、研究目标及社区层面的未来方向，并验证了PASS平台的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语义AI安全需系统化研究框架支撑，PASS平台为后续攻击验证与防御研究提供了可扩展的基础工具。

search_text: SoK: On the Semantic AI Security in Autonomous Driving SoK：论自动驾驶中的语义人工智能安全 Autonomous Driving (AD) systems rely on AI components to make safety and correct driving decisions. Unfortunately, today's AI algorithms are known to be generally vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, for such AI component-level vulnerabilities to be semantically impactful at the system level, it needs to address non-trivial semantic gaps both (1) from the system-level attack input spaces to those at AI component level, and (2) from AI component-level attack impacts to those at the system level. In this paper, we define such research space as semantic AI security as opposed to generic AI security. Over the past 5 years, increasingly more research works are performed to tackle such semantic AI security challenges in AD context, which has started to show an exponential growth trend. In this paper, we perform the first systematization of knowledge of such growing semantic AD AI security research space. In total, we collect and analyze 53 such papers, and systematically taxonomize them based on research aspects critical for the security field. We summarize 6 most substantial scientific gaps observed based on quantitative comparisons both vertically among existing AD AI security works and horizontally with security works from closely-related domains. With these, we are able to provide insights and potential future directions not only at the design level, but also at the research goal, methodology, and community levels. To address the most critical scientific methodology-level gap, we take the initiative to develop an open-source, uniform, and extensible system-driven evaluation platform, named PASS, for the semantic AD AI security research community. We also use our implemented platform prototype to showcase the capabilities and benefits of such a platform using representative semantic AD AI attacks. 自动驾驶 (AD) 系统依靠人工智能组件来做出安全和正确的驾驶决策。不幸的是，众所周知，当今的人工智能算法通常容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，为了使此类人工智能组件级漏洞在系统级产生语义影响，需要解决以下两个重要的语义差距：（1）从系统级攻击输入空间到人工智能组件级的攻击输入空间，以及（2）从人工智能组件级攻击影响到系统级的攻击影响。在本文中，我们将此类研究空间定义为语义人工智能安全，而不是通用人工智能安全。在过去的 5 年里，越来越多的研究工作来解决 AD 环境中的此类语义 AI 安全挑战，并开始呈现指数增长趋势。在本文中，我们对这种不断发展的语义 AD 人工智能安全研究领域的知识进行了首次系统化。我们总共收集并分析了 53 篇此类论文，并根据对安全领域至关重要的研究方面对它们进行系统分类。我们根据现有 AD AI 安全工作之间的纵向比较以及与密切相关领域的安全工作的横向比较，总结了观察到的 6 个最重大的科学差距。有了这些，我们不仅能够在设计层面，而且在研究目标、方法论和社区层面提供见解和潜在的未来方向。为了解决最关键的科学方法论层面的差距，我们主动为语义AD人工智能安全研究社区开发了一个开源、统一、可扩展的系统驱动评估平台，名为PASS。我们还使用我们实现的平台原型来展示使用代表性语义 AD AI 攻击的此类平台的功能和优势。 本文系统化梳理了自动驾驶领域语义AI安全的研究现状，分析了53篇相关论文并提出开源评估平台PASS。 Junjie Shen,Ningfei Wang,Ziwen Wan,Yunpeng Luo,Takami Sato,Zhisheng Hu,Xinyang Zhang,Shengjian Guo,Zhenyu Zhong,Kang Li,Ziming Zhao,Chunming Qiao,Qi Alfred Chen cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Shihao Song,Adarsha Balaji,Anup Das,Nagarajan Kandasamy
title: Design-Technology Co-Optimization for NVM-based Neuromorphic Processing Elements
title_zh: 基于 NVM 的神经形态处理元件的设计技术协同优化
comment: Accepted for publication at ACM TECS
comments: Accepted for publication at ACM TECS
abstract: Neuromorphic hardware platforms can significantly lower the energy overhead of a machine learning inference task. We present a design-technology tradeoff analysis to implement such inference tasks on the processing elements (PEs) of a Non- Volatile Memory (NVM)-based neuromorphic hardware. Through detailed circuit-level simulations at scaled process technology nodes, we show the negative impact of technology scaling on the information-processing latency, which impacts the quality-of-service (QoS) of an embedded ML system. At a finer granularity, the latency inside a PE depends on 1) the delay introduced by parasitic components on its current paths, and 2) the varying delay to sense different resistance states of its NVM cells. Based on these two observations, we make the following three contributions. First, on the technology front, we propose an optimization scheme where the NVM resistance state that takes the longest time to sense is set on current paths having the least delay, and vice versa, reducing the average PE latency, which improves the QoS. Second, on the architecture front, we introduce isolation transistors within each PE to partition it into regions that can be individually power-gated, reducing both latency and energy. Finally, on the system-software front, we propose a mechanism to leverage the proposed technological and architectural enhancements when implementing a machine-learning inference task on neuromorphic PEs of the hardware. Evaluations with a recent neuromorphic hardware architecture show that our proposed design-technology co-optimization approach improves both performance and energy efficiency of machine-learning inference tasks without incurring high cost-per-bit.
summary: Neuromorphic hardware platforms can significantly lower the energy overhead of a machine learning inference task. We present a design-technology tradeoff analysis to implement such inference tasks on the processing elements (PEs) of a Non- Volatile Memory (NVM)-based neuromorphic hardware. Through detailed circuit-level simulations at scaled process technology nodes, we show the negative impact of technology scaling on the information-processing latency, which impacts the quality-of-service (QoS) of an embedded ML system. At a finer granularity, the latency inside a PE depends on 1) the delay introduced by parasitic components on its current paths, and 2) the varying delay to sense different resistance states of its NVM cells. Based on these two observations, we make the following three contributions. First, on the technology front, we propose an optimization scheme where the NVM resistance state that takes the longest time to sense is set on current paths having the least delay, and vice versa, reducing the average PE latency, which improves the QoS. Second, on the architecture front, we introduce isolation transistors within each PE to partition it into regions that can be individually power-gated, reducing both latency and energy. Finally, on the system-software front, we propose a mechanism to leverage the proposed technological and architectural enhancements when implementing a machine-learning inference task on neuromorphic PEs of the hardware. Evaluations with a recent neuromorphic hardware architecture show that our proposed design-technology co-optimization approach improves both performance and energy efficiency of machine-learning inference tasks without incurring high cost-per-bit.
abstract_zh: 神经形态硬件平台可以显着降低机器学习推理任务的能量开销。我们提出了一种设计技术权衡分析，以在基于非易失性存储器（NVM）的神经形态硬件的处理元件（PE）上实现此类推理任务。通过在扩展的工艺技术节点上进行详细的电路级模拟，我们展示了技术扩展对信息处理延迟的负面影响，这会影响嵌入式机器学习系统的服务质量 (QoS)。在更细的粒度上，PE 内部的延迟取决于 1) 其当前路径上的寄生组件引入的延迟，以及 2) 感测其 NVM 单元的不同电阻状态的变化延迟。基于这两个观察，我们做出以下三点贡献。首先，在技术方面，我们提出了一种优化方案，将感知时间最长的NVM电阻状态设置在延迟最少的当前路径上，反之亦然，减少了平均PE延迟，从而提高了QoS。其次，在架构方面，我们在每个 PE 中引入隔离晶体管，将其划分为可以单独进行电源门控的区域，从而减少延迟和能耗。最后，在系统软件方面，我们提出了一种机制，在硬件的神经形态 PE 上实现机器学习推理任务时，利用所提出的技术和架构增强功能。对最新神经形态硬件架构的评估表明，我们提出的设计技术协同优化方法提高了机器学习推理任务的性能和能源效率，而不会产生高昂的每比特成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非易失性存储器（NVM）的神经形态处理单元（PE）设计-技术协同优化方法，以提升机器学习推理任务的性能和能效。
AI.motivation: 随着技术节点缩放，神经形态硬件的延迟和服务质量（QoS）面临挑战，需通过设计与技术协同优化解决NVM单元延迟和能耗问题。
AI.method: 通过电路级仿真分析技术缩放对延迟的影响，提出三方面优化：1）NVM电阻状态与电流路径延迟的匹配；2）引入隔离晶体管实现电源门控分区；3）系统软件层面的协同机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在不增加比特成本的前提下，显著提升了神经形态硬件的推理性能和能效。
AI.conclusion: 设计-技术协同优化能有效解决NVM神经形态处理单元的延迟与能耗矛盾，为嵌入式机器学习系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Lei Fan,Yiwen Ding,Dongdong Fan,Donglin Di,Maurice Pagnucco,Yang Song
title: GrainSpace: A Large-scale Dataset for Fine-grained and Domain-adaptive Recognition of Cereal Grains
title_zh: GrainSpace：用于谷物细粒度和领域自适应识别的大型数据集
comment: 8pages, 6 figures, accepted by CVPR2022 dataset is available at \url{https://github.com/hellodfan/GrainSpace}
comments: 8pages, 6 figures, accepted by CVPR2022 dataset is available at \url{https://github.com/hellodfan/GrainSpace}
abstract: Cereal grains are a vital part of human diets and are important commodities for people's livelihood and international trade. Grain Appearance Inspection (GAI) serves as one of the crucial steps for the determination of grain quality and grain stratification for proper circulation, storage and food processing, etc. GAI is routinely performed manually by qualified inspectors with the aid of some hand tools. Automated GAI has the benefit of greatly assisting inspectors with their jobs but has been limited due to the lack of datasets and clear definitions of the tasks. In this paper we formulate GAI as three ubiquitous computer vision tasks: fine-grained recognition, domain adaptation and out-of-distribution recognition. We present a large-scale and publicly available cereal grains dataset called GrainSpace. Specifically, we construct three types of device prototypes for data acquisition, and a total of 5.25 million images determined by professional inspectors. The grain samples including wheat, maize and rice are collected from five countries and more than 30 regions. We also develop a comprehensive benchmark based on semi-supervised learning and self-supervised learning techniques. To the best of our knowledge, GrainSpace is the first publicly released dataset for cereal grain inspection.
summary: Cereal grains are a vital part of human diets and are important commodities for people's livelihood and international trade. Grain Appearance Inspection (GAI) serves as one of the crucial steps for the determination of grain quality and grain stratification for proper circulation, storage and food processing, etc. GAI is routinely performed manually by qualified inspectors with the aid of some hand tools. Automated GAI has the benefit of greatly assisting inspectors with their jobs but has been limited due to the lack of datasets and clear definitions of the tasks. In this paper we formulate GAI as three ubiquitous computer vision tasks: fine-grained recognition, domain adaptation and out-of-distribution recognition. We present a large-scale and publicly available cereal grains dataset called GrainSpace. Specifically, we construct three types of device prototypes for data acquisition, and a total of 5.25 million images determined by professional inspectors. The grain samples including wheat, maize and rice are collected from five countries and more than 30 regions. We also develop a comprehensive benchmark based on semi-supervised learning and self-supervised learning techniques. To the best of our knowledge, GrainSpace is the first publicly released dataset for cereal grain inspection.
abstract_zh: 谷物是人类膳食的重要组成部分，是关系国计民生和国际贸易的重要商品。谷物外观检验（GAI）是确定谷物质量和谷物分层以确保适当流通、储存和食品加工等的关键步骤之一。GAI 通常由合格的检验人员借助一些手动工具手动执行。自动化 GAI 的优点是可以极大地协助检查员完成工作，但由于缺乏数据集和明确的任务定义而受到限制。在本文中，我们将 GAI 表述为三个普遍存在的计算机视觉任务：细粒度识别、领域适应和分布外识别。我们提出了一个大规模且公开的谷物数据集，称为 GrainSpace。具体来说，我们构建了三种类型的设备原型进行数据采集，并由专业检查人员确定了总共 525 万张图像。小麦、玉米、大米等谷物样品采集自5个国家、30多个地区。我们还开发了基于半监督学习和自监督学习技术的综合基准。据我们所知，GrainSpace 是第一个公开发布的谷物检验数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GrainSpace数据集，用于解决谷物外观检测中的细粒度识别、领域自适应和分布外识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统谷物外观检测依赖人工操作效率低且易出错，而自动化检测因缺乏高质量数据集和明确任务定义进展受限。
AI.method: 构建三种设备原型采集数据，收集5.25万张由专业检验员标注的图片，涵盖小麦、玉米、大米等样本，并基于半监督和自监督学习开发综合基准。
AI.result: GrainSpace成为首个公开发布的谷物检测数据集，为自动化检测提供基础支撑。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和基准为谷物质量自动化检测提供了新方向，推动计算机视觉技术在农业领域的应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出GrainSpace数据集，用于解决谷物外观检测中的细粒度识别、领域自适应和分布外识别任务。

search_text: GrainSpace: A Large-scale Dataset for Fine-grained and Domain-adaptive Recognition of Cereal Grains GrainSpace：用于谷物细粒度和领域自适应识别的大型数据集 Cereal grains are a vital part of human diets and are important commodities for people's livelihood and international trade. Grain Appearance Inspection (GAI) serves as one of the crucial steps for the determination of grain quality and grain stratification for proper circulation, storage and food processing, etc. GAI is routinely performed manually by qualified inspectors with the aid of some hand tools. Automated GAI has the benefit of greatly assisting inspectors with their jobs but has been limited due to the lack of datasets and clear definitions of the tasks. In this paper we formulate GAI as three ubiquitous computer vision tasks: fine-grained recognition, domain adaptation and out-of-distribution recognition. We present a large-scale and publicly available cereal grains dataset called GrainSpace. Specifically, we construct three types of device prototypes for data acquisition, and a total of 5.25 million images determined by professional inspectors. The grain samples including wheat, maize and rice are collected from five countries and more than 30 regions. We also develop a comprehensive benchmark based on semi-supervised learning and self-supervised learning techniques. To the best of our knowledge, GrainSpace is the first publicly released dataset for cereal grain inspection. 谷物是人类膳食的重要组成部分，是关系国计民生和国际贸易的重要商品。谷物外观检验（GAI）是确定谷物质量和谷物分层以确保适当流通、储存和食品加工等的关键步骤之一。GAI 通常由合格的检验人员借助一些手动工具手动执行。自动化 GAI 的优点是可以极大地协助检查员完成工作，但由于缺乏数据集和明确的任务定义而受到限制。在本文中，我们将 GAI 表述为三个普遍存在的计算机视觉任务：细粒度识别、领域适应和分布外识别。我们提出了一个大规模且公开的谷物数据集，称为 GrainSpace。具体来说，我们构建了三种类型的设备原型进行数据采集，并由专业检查人员确定了总共 525 万张图像。小麦、玉米、大米等谷物样品采集自5个国家、30多个地区。我们还开发了基于半监督学习和自监督学习技术的综合基准。据我们所知，GrainSpace 是第一个公开发布的谷物检验数据集。 本文提出GrainSpace数据集，用于解决谷物外观检测中的细粒度识别、领域自适应和分布外识别任务。 Lei Fan,Yiwen Ding,Dongdong Fan,Donglin Di,Maurice Pagnucco,Yang Song cs.CV,cs.DB

authors_text: Haiyang Liu,Zihao Zhu,Naoya Iwamoto,Yichen Peng,Zhengqing Li,You Zhou,Elif Bozkurt,Bo Zheng
title: BEAT: A Large-Scale Semantic and Emotional Multi-Modal Dataset for Conversational Gestures Synthesis
title_zh: BEAT：用于会话手势合成的大规模语义和情感多模态数据集
abstract: Achieving realistic, vivid, and human-like synthesized conversational gestures conditioned on multi-modal data is still an unsolved problem due to the lack of available datasets, models and standard evaluation metrics. To address this, we build Body-Expression-Audio-Text dataset, BEAT, which has i) 76 hours, high-quality, multi-modal data captured from 30 speakers talking with eight different emotions and in four different languages, ii) 32 millions frame-level emotion and semantic relevance annotations. Our statistical analysis on BEAT demonstrates the correlation of conversational gestures with facial expressions, emotions, and semantics, in addition to the known correlation with audio, text, and speaker identity. Based on this observation, we propose a baseline model, Cascaded Motion Network (CaMN), which consists of above six modalities modeled in a cascaded architecture for gesture synthesis. To evaluate the semantic relevancy, we introduce a metric, Semantic Relevance Gesture Recall (SRGR). Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate metrics' validness, ground truth data quality, and baseline's state-of-the-art performance. To the best of our knowledge, BEAT is the largest motion capture dataset for investigating human gestures, which may contribute to a number of different research fields, including controllable gesture synthesis, cross-modality analysis, and emotional gesture recognition. The data, code and model are available on https://pantomatrix.github.io/BEAT/.
summary: Achieving realistic, vivid, and human-like synthesized conversational gestures conditioned on multi-modal data is still an unsolved problem due to the lack of available datasets, models and standard evaluation metrics. To address this, we build Body-Expression-Audio-Text dataset, BEAT, which has i) 76 hours, high-quality, multi-modal data captured from 30 speakers talking with eight different emotions and in four different languages, ii) 32 millions frame-level emotion and semantic relevance annotations. Our statistical analysis on BEAT demonstrates the correlation of conversational gestures with facial expressions, emotions, and semantics, in addition to the known correlation with audio, text, and speaker identity. Based on this observation, we propose a baseline model, Cascaded Motion Network (CaMN), which consists of above six modalities modeled in a cascaded architecture for gesture synthesis. To evaluate the semantic relevancy, we introduce a metric, Semantic Relevance Gesture Recall (SRGR). Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate metrics' validness, ground truth data quality, and baseline's state-of-the-art performance. To the best of our knowledge, BEAT is the largest motion capture dataset for investigating human gestures, which may contribute to a number of different research fields, including controllable gesture synthesis, cross-modality analysis, and emotional gesture recognition. The data, code and model are available on https://pantomatrix.github.io/BEAT/.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏可用的数据集、模型和标准评估指标，在多模态数据上实现逼真、生动、类人的合成对话手势仍然是一个未解决的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了 Body-Expression-Audio-Text 数据集 BEAT，它具有 i) 76 小时从 30 位说话者以 8 种不同情绪和四种不同语言交谈时捕获的高质量多模态数据，ii) 3200 万个帧级情感和语义相关性注释。我们对 BEAT 的统计分析表明，除了已知的与音频、文本和说话者身份的相关性之外，会话手势还与面部表情、情绪和语义相关。基于这一观察，我们提出了一个基线模型，级联运动网络（CaMN），它由在级联架构中建模的上述六种模式组成，用于手势合成。为了评估语义相关性，我们引入了一个指标：语义相关性手势回忆（SRGR）。定性和定量实验证明了指标的有效性、真实数据质量以及基线的最先进性能。据我们所知，BEAT 是用于研究人类手势的最大运动捕捉数据集，这可能有助于许多不同的研究领域，包括可控手势合成、跨模态分析和情感手势识别。数据、代码和模型可在 https://pantomatrix.github.io/BEAT/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 构建大规模多模态数据集BEAT及基线模型CaMN，用于基于语义和情感的对话手势合成。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏高质量多模态数据集、模型及评估指标，导致真实对话手势合成难以实现。
AI.method: 创建包含76小时多模态数据（含情绪、语言、面部表情等）的BEAT数据集，提出级联运动网络（CaMN）模型，并设计语义相关性手势召回率（SRGR）评估指标。
AI.result: 实验验证了SRGR指标有效性、数据集质量及CaMN模型的先进性能，BEAT成为最大动作捕捉数据集。
AI.conclusion: BEAT为可控手势合成、跨模态分析和情感识别提供新资源，推动相关领域研究进展。

search_text: BEAT: A Large-Scale Semantic and Emotional Multi-Modal Dataset for Conversational Gestures Synthesis BEAT：用于会话手势合成的大规模语义和情感多模态数据集 Achieving realistic, vivid, and human-like synthesized conversational gestures conditioned on multi-modal data is still an unsolved problem due to the lack of available datasets, models and standard evaluation metrics. To address this, we build Body-Expression-Audio-Text dataset, BEAT, which has i) 76 hours, high-quality, multi-modal data captured from 30 speakers talking with eight different emotions and in four different languages, ii) 32 millions frame-level emotion and semantic relevance annotations. Our statistical analysis on BEAT demonstrates the correlation of conversational gestures with facial expressions, emotions, and semantics, in addition to the known correlation with audio, text, and speaker identity. Based on this observation, we propose a baseline model, Cascaded Motion Network (CaMN), which consists of above six modalities modeled in a cascaded architecture for gesture synthesis. To evaluate the semantic relevancy, we introduce a metric, Semantic Relevance Gesture Recall (SRGR). Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate metrics' validness, ground truth data quality, and baseline's state-of-the-art performance. To the best of our knowledge, BEAT is the largest motion capture dataset for investigating human gestures, which may contribute to a number of different research fields, including controllable gesture synthesis, cross-modality analysis, and emotional gesture recognition. authors_text: Karthik Seemakurthy,Erchan Aptoula,Charles Fox,Petra Bosilj
title: Domain Generalisation for Object Detection under Covariate and Concept Shift
title_zh: 协变量和概念转变下目标检测的领域泛化
abstract: Domain generalisation aims to promote the learning of domain-invariant features while suppressing domain-specific features, so that a model can generalise better to previously unseen target domains. An approach to domain generalisation for object detection is proposed, the first such approach applicable to any object detection architecture. Based on a rigorous mathematical analysis, we extend approaches based on feature alignment with a novel component for performing class conditional alignment at the instance level, in addition to aligning the marginal feature distributions across domains at the image level. This allows us to fully address both components of domain shift, i.e. covariate and concept shift, and learn a domain agnostic feature representation. We perform extensive evaluation with both one-stage (FCOS, YOLO) and two-stage (FRCNN) detectors, on a newly proposed benchmark comprising several different datasets for autonomous driving applications (Cityscapes, BDD10K, ACDC, IDD) as well as the GWHD dataset for precision agriculture, and show consistent improvements to the generalisation and localisation performance over baselines and state-of-the-art.
summary: Domain generalisation aims to promote the learning of domain-invariant features while suppressing domain-specific features, so that a model can generalise better to previously unseen target domains. An approach to domain generalisation for object detection is proposed, the first such approach applicable to any object detection architecture. Based on a rigorous mathematical analysis, we extend approaches based on feature alignment with a novel component for performing class conditional alignment at the instance level, in addition to aligning the marginal feature distributions across domains at the image level. This allows us to fully address both components of domain shift, i.e. covariate and concept shift, and learn a domain agnostic feature representation. We perform extensive evaluation with both one-stage (FCOS, YOLO) and two-stage (FRCNN) detectors, on a newly proposed benchmark comprising several different datasets for autonomous driving applications (Cityscapes, BDD10K, ACDC, IDD) as well as the GWHD dataset for precision agriculture, and show consistent improvements to the generalisation and localisation performance over baselines and state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 领域泛化旨在促进领域不变特征的学习，同时抑制领域特定特征，以便模型可以更好地泛化到以前未见过的目标领域。提出了一种用于对象检测的域泛化方法，这是第一个适用于任何对象检测架构的方法。基于严格的数学分析，除了在图像级别跨域对齐边缘特征分布之外，我们还使用一种新颖的组件扩展了基于特征对齐的方法，用于在实例级别执行类条件对齐。这使我们能够完全解决域转移的两个组成部分，即协变量和概念转移，并学习与域无关的特征表示。我们使用一级（FCOS、YOLO）和两级（FRCNN）检测器在新提出的基准上进行了广泛的评估，该基准包括自动驾驶应用的几个不同数据集（Cityscapes、BDD10K、ACDC、IDD）以及精准农业的 GWHD 数据集，并显示出相对于基准和最先进技术的泛化和本地化性能的持续改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于任意目标检测架构的领域泛化方法，通过解决协变量和概念偏移问题，提升模型在未见过的目标领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法难以同时有效应对协变量偏移（输入分布变化）和概念偏移（语义关联变化），导致模型在跨领域场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 基于严格数学分析，扩展特征对齐方法，在图像级对齐边际特征分布的同时，新增实例级类别条件对齐模块，全面处理领域偏移的两个维度。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶（Cityscapes/BDD10K等）和精准农业（GWHDD）数据集上，相较于基线和SOTA方法，在泛化性和定位性能上均取得一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合建模领域不变特征，有效解决了协变量和概念偏移问题，验证了其在多场景、多架构目标检测任务中的普适性。

conclusion: 该方法通过联合建模领域不变特征，有效解决了协变量和概念偏移问题，验证了其在多场景、多架构目标检测任务中的普适性。
search_text: Domain Generalisation for Object Detection under Covariate and Concept Shift 协变量和概念转变下目标检测的领域泛化 Domain generalisation aims to promote the learning of domain-invariant features while suppressing domain-specific features, so that a model can generalise better to previously unseen target domains. An approach to domain generalisation for object detection is proposed, the first such approach applicable to any object detection architecture. Based on a rigorous mathematical analysis, we extend approaches based on feature alignment with a novel component for performing class conditional alignment at the instance level, in addition to aligning the marginal feature distributions across domains at the image level. This allows us to fully address both components of domain shift, i.e. covariate and concept shift, and learn a domain agnostic feature representation. We perform extensive evaluation with both one-stage (FCOS, YOLO) and two-stage (FRCNN) detectors, on a newly proposed benchmark comprising several different datasets for autonomous driving applications (Cityscapes, BDD10K, ACDC, IDD) as well as the GWHD dataset for precision agriculture, and show consistent improvements to the generalisation and localisation performance over baselines and state-of-the-art. 领域泛化旨在促进领域不变特征的学习，同时抑制领域特定特征，以便模型可以更好地泛化到以前未见过的目标领域。提出了一种用于对象检测的域泛化方法，这是第一个适用于任何对象检测架构的方法。基于严格的数学分析，除了在图像级别跨域对齐边缘特征分布之外，我们还使用一种新颖的组件扩展了基于特征对齐的方法，用于在实例级别执行类条件对齐。这使我们能够完全解决域转移的两个组成部分，即协变量和概念转移，并学习与域无关的特征表示。我们使用一级（FCOS、YOLO）和两级（FRCNN）检测器在新提出的基准上进行了广泛的评估，该基准包括自动驾驶应用的几个不同数据集（Cityscapes、BDD10K、ACDC、IDD）以及精准农业的 GWHD 数据集，并显示出相对于基准和最先进技术的泛化和本地化性能的持续改进。 本文提出一种适用于任意目标检测架构的领域泛化方法，通过解决协变量和概念偏移问题，提升模型在未见过的目标领域的泛化能力。 Karthik Seemakurthy,Erchan Aptoula,Charles Fox,Petra Bosilj cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaotian Hao,Hangyu Mao,Weixun Wang,Yaodong Yang,Dong Li,Yan Zheng,Zhen Wang,Jianye Hao
title: Breaking the Curse of Dimensionality in Multiagent State Space: A Unified Agent Permutation Framework
title_zh: 打破多智能体状态空间中的维数诅咒：统一的智能体排列框架
abstract: The state space in Multiagent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) grows exponentially with the agent number. Such a curse of dimensionality results in poor scalability and low sample efficiency, inhibiting MARL for decades. To break this curse, we propose a unified agent permutation framework that exploits the permutation invariance (PI) and permutation equivariance (PE) inductive biases to reduce the multiagent state space. Our insight is that permuting the order of entities in the factored multiagent state space does not change the information. Specifically, we propose two novel implementations: a Dynamic Permutation Network (DPN) and a Hyper Policy Network (HPN). The core idea is to build separate entity-wise PI input and PE output network modules to connect the entity-factored state space and action space in an end-to-end way. DPN achieves such connections by two separate module selection networks, which consistently assign the same input module to the same input entity (guarantee PI) and assign the same output module to the same entity-related output (guarantee PE). To enhance the representation capability, HPN replaces the module selection networks of DPN with hypernetworks to directly generate the corresponding module weights. Extensive experiments in SMAC, Google Research Football and MPE validate that the proposed methods significantly boost the performance and the learning efficiency of existing MARL algorithms. Remarkably, in SMAC, we achieve 100% win rates in almost all hard and super-hard scenarios (never achieved before).
summary: The state space in Multiagent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) grows exponentially with the agent number. Such a curse of dimensionality results in poor scalability and low sample efficiency, inhibiting MARL for decades. To break this curse, we propose a unified agent permutation framework that exploits the permutation invariance (PI) and permutation equivariance (PE) inductive biases to reduce the multiagent state space. Our insight is that permuting the order of entities in the factored multiagent state space does not change the information. Specifically, we propose two novel implementations: a Dynamic Permutation Network (DPN) and a Hyper Policy Network (HPN). The core idea is to build separate entity-wise PI input and PE output network modules to connect the entity-factored state space and action space in an end-to-end way. DPN achieves such connections by two separate module selection networks, which consistently assign the same input module to the same input entity (guarantee PI) and assign the same output module to the same entity-related output (guarantee PE). To enhance the representation capability, HPN replaces the module selection networks of DPN with hypernetworks to directly generate the corresponding module weights. Extensive experiments in SMAC, Google Research Football and MPE validate that the proposed methods significantly boost the performance and the learning efficiency of existing MARL algorithms. Remarkably, in SMAC, we achieve 100% win rates in almost all hard and super-hard scenarios (never achieved before).
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的状态空间随着智能体数量呈指数增长。这种维数灾难导致可扩展性差和样本效率低，阻碍了 MARL 数十年。为了打破这个诅咒，我们提出了一个统一的智能体排列框架，该框架利用排列不变性（PI）和排列等变性（PE）归纳偏差来减少多智能体状态空间。我们的见解是，排列分解多主体状态空间中实体的顺序不会改变信息。具体来说，我们提出了两种新颖的实现：动态排列网络（DPN）和超策略网络（HPN）。其核心思想是构建独立的实体PI输入和PE输出网络模块，以端到端的方式连接实体因子的状态空间和动作空间。 DPN 通过两个独立的模块选择网络来实现这种连接，这两个网络一致地将相同的输入模块分配给相同的输入实体（保证 PI），并将相同的输出模块分配给相同的实体相关输出（保证 PE）。为了增强表示能力，HPN用超网络代替DPN的模块选择网络，直接生成相应的模块权重。 SMAC、Google Research Football 和 MPE 的大量实验验证了所提出的方法显着提高了现有 MARL 算法的性能和学习效率。值得注意的是，在 SMAC 中，我们在几乎所有困难和超困难场景中都实现了 100% 的胜率（以前从未实现过）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一智能体置换框架，通过利用置换不变性与等变性归纳偏置解决多智能体强化学习中的维度灾难问题。
AI.motivation: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）中状态空间随智能体数量指数增长，导致可扩展性差与样本效率低，长期限制算法发展。
AI.method: 设计动态置换网络（DPN）与超策略网络（HPN），通过实体级模块选择网络实现置换不变性输入与等变性输出，HPN进一步用超网络直接生成模块权重增强表征能力。
AI.result: 在SMAC、Google Research Football和MPE基准测试中显著提升算法性能与学习效率，SMAC中首次在多数困难场景达成100%胜率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效打破维度灾难限制，为MARL提供新范式，实验验证其在多个复杂任务中的优越性与广泛适用性。

authors_text: Liyao Tang,Yibing Zhan,Zhe Chen,Baosheng Yu,Dacheng Tao
title: Contrastive Boundary Learning for Point Cloud Segmentation
title_zh: 点云分割的对比边界学习
abstract: Point cloud segmentation is fundamental in understanding 3D environments. However, current 3D point cloud segmentation methods usually perform poorly on scene boundaries, which degenerates the overall segmentation performance. In this paper, we focus on the segmentation of scene boundaries. Accordingly, we first explore metrics to evaluate the segmentation performance on scene boundaries. To address the unsatisfactory performance on boundaries, we then propose a novel contrastive boundary learning (CBL) framework for point cloud segmentation. Specifically, the proposed CBL enhances feature discrimination between points across boundaries by contrasting their representations with the assistance of scene contexts at multiple scales. By applying CBL on three different baseline methods, we experimentally show that CBL consistently improves different baselines and assists them to achieve compelling performance on boundaries, as well as the overall performance, eg in mIoU. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and the importance of boundaries for 3D point cloud segmentation. Code and model will be made publicly available at https://github.com/LiyaoTang/contrastBoundary.
summary: Point cloud segmentation is fundamental in understanding 3D environments. However, current 3D point cloud segmentation methods usually perform poorly on scene boundaries, which degenerates the overall segmentation performance. In this paper, we focus on the segmentation of scene boundaries. Accordingly, we first explore metrics to evaluate the segmentation performance on scene boundaries. To address the unsatisfactory performance on boundaries, we then propose a novel contrastive boundary learning (CBL) framework for point cloud segmentation. Specifically, the proposed CBL enhances feature discrimination between points across boundaries by contrasting their representations with the assistance of scene contexts at multiple scales. By applying CBL on three different baseline methods, we experimentally show that CBL consistently improves different baselines and assists them to achieve compelling performance on boundaries, as well as the overall performance, eg in mIoU. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method and the importance of boundaries for 3D point cloud segmentation. Code and model will be made publicly available at https://github.com/LiyaoTang/contrastBoundary.
abstract_zh: 点云分割是理解 3D 环境的基础。然而，当前的 3D 点云分割方法通常在场景边界上表现不佳，从而降低了整体分割性能。在本文中，我们重点关注场景边界的分割。因此，我们首先探索评估场景边界分割性能的指标。为了解决边界性能不理想的问题，我们提出了一种新颖的用于点云分割的对比边界学习（CBL）框架。具体来说，所提出的 CBL 通过在多个尺度的场景上下文的帮助下对比它们的表示来增强跨边界点之间的特征区分。通过在三种不同的基线方法上应用 CBL，我们通过实验证明 CBL 能够持续改进不同的基线，并帮助它们在边界上实现引人注目的性能，以及整体性能，例如 mIoU。实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性以及边界对于 3D 点云分割的重要性。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/LiyaoTang/contrastBoundary 上公开。

AI.tldr: 提出对比边界学习框架以提升点云分割中场景边界分割效果
AI.motivation: 现有方法在场景边界分割上表现不足，影响整体性能，需改进边界处理以提高分割效果
AI.method: 提出对比边界学习（CBL）框架，利用多尺度场景上下文对比学习增强跨边界的点特征区分
AI.result: 实验表明CBL有效提升不同基线模型的边界分割及整体性能（如mIoU）
AI.conclusion: 边界对点云分割至关重要，CBL方法有效验证了其重要性并提升性能

authors_text: Jérôme Daniel,Srđan Kitić
title: Echo-enabled Direction-of-Arrival and range estimation of a mobile source in Ambisonic domain
title_zh: Ambisonic 域中移动源的启用回声的到达方向和范围估计
abstract: Range estimation of a far field sound source in a reverberant environment is known to be a notoriously difficult problem, hence most localization methods are only capable of estimating the source's Direction-of-Arrival (DoA). In an earlier work, we have demonstrated that, under certain restrictive acoustic conditions and given the orientation of a reflecting surface, one can exploit the dominant acoustic reflection to evaluate the DoA \emph{and} the distance to a static sound source in Ambisonic domain. In this article, we leverage the recently presented Generalized Time-domain Velocity Vector (GTVV) representation to estimate these quantities for a moving sound source without an a priori knowledge of reflectors' orientations. We show that the trajectories of a moving source and the corresponding reflections are spatially and temporally related, which can be used to infer the absolute delay of the propagating source signal and, therefore, approximate the microphone-to-source distance. Experiments on real sound data confirm the validity of the proposed approach.
summary: Range estimation of a far field sound source in a reverberant environment is known to be a notoriously difficult problem, hence most localization methods are only capable of estimating the source's Direction-of-Arrival (DoA). In an earlier work, we have demonstrated that, under certain restrictive acoustic conditions and given the orientation of a reflecting surface, one can exploit the dominant acoustic reflection to evaluate the DoA \emph{and} the distance to a static sound source in Ambisonic domain. In this article, we leverage the recently presented Generalized Time-domain Velocity Vector (GTVV) representation to estimate these quantities for a moving sound source without an a priori knowledge of reflectors' orientations. We show that the trajectories of a moving source and the corresponding reflections are spatially and temporally related, which can be used to infer the absolute delay of the propagating source signal and, therefore, approximate the microphone-to-source distance. Experiments on real sound data confirm the validity of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，混响环境中远场声源的距离估计是一个众所周知的难题，因此大多数定位方法只能估计声源的到达方向（DoA）。在早期的工作中，我们已经证明，在某些限制性声学条件下并给定反射表面的方向，可以利用主要声学反射来评估 DoA \emph{和} Ambisonic 域中到静态声源的距离。在本文中，我们利用最近提出的广义时域速度矢量（GTVV）表示来估计移动声源的这些量，而无需先验了解反射器的方向。我们表明，移动源的轨迹和相应的反射在空间和时间上是相关的，这可以用来推断传播源信号的绝对延迟，从而近似麦克风到源的距离。真实声音数据的实验证实了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在混响环境中利用Ambisonic域估计移动声源方向到达角（DoA）和距离的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以在混响环境中同时估计声源的距离和方向，且现有技术需依赖反射面的先验信息，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 基于广义时域速度矢量（GTVV）表示，通过分析移动声源及其反射信号在时空上的关联性，推断出声源到麦克风的绝对时延从而估算距离。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了该方法在真实声学数据中的有效性，成功实现了对移动声源的DoA和距离联合估计。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法无需反射面先验信息即可同时估计移动声源的方位和距离，为复杂环境下的声源定位提供了新思路。
