search_text: Echo-enabled Direction-of-Arrival and range estimation of a mobile source in Ambisonic domain Ambisonic 域中移动源的启用回声的到达方向和范围估计 Range estimation of a far field sound source in a reverberant environment is known to be a notoriously difficult problem, hence most localization methods are only capable of estimating the source's Direction-of-Arrival (DoA). In an earlier work, we have demonstrated that, under certain restrictive acoustic conditions and given the orientation of a reflecting surface, one can exploit the dominant acoustic reflection to evaluate the DoA \emph{and} the distance to a static sound source in Ambisonic domain. In this article, we leverage the recently presented Generalized Time-domain Velocity Vector (GTVV) representation to estimate these quantities for a moving sound source without an a priori knowledge of reflectors' orientations. We show that the trajectories of a moving source and the corresponding reflections are spatially and temporally related, which can be used to infer the absolute delay of the propagating source signal and, therefore, approximate the microphone-to-source distance. Experiments on real sound data confirm the validity of the proposed approach. 众所周知，混响环境中远场声源的距离估计是一个众所周知的难题，因此大多数定位方法只能估计声源的到达方向（DoA）。在早期的工作中，我们已经证明，在某些限制性声学条件下并给定反射表面的方向，可以利用主要声学反射来评估 DoA \emph{和} Ambisonic 域中到静态声源的距离。在本文中，我们利用最近提出的广义时域速度矢量（GTVV）表示来估计移动声源的这些量，而无需先验了解反射器的方向。我们表明，移动源的轨迹和相应的反射在空间和时间上是相关的，这可以用来推断传播源信号的绝对延迟，从而近似麦克风到源的距离。真实声音数据的实验证实了所提出方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种在混响环境中利用Ambisonic域估计移动声源方向到达角（DoA）和距离的方法。 Jérôme Daniel,Srđan Kitić eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Fuqiang Zhao,Jionghua Yu,Enjun Xing,Wenming Song,Xue Xu
title: Real-time Scene Text Detection Based on Global Level and Word Level Features
title_zh: 基于全局级和词级特征的实时场景文本检测
abstract: It is an extremely challenging task to detect arbitrary shape text in natural scenes on high accuracy and efficiency. In this paper, we propose a scene text detection framework, namely GWNet, which mainly includes two modules: Global module and RCNN module. Specifically, Global module improves the adaptive performance of the DB (Differentiable Binarization) module by adding k submodule and shift submodule. Two submodules enhance the adaptability of amplifying factor k, accelerate the convergence of models and help to produce more accurate detection results. RCNN module fuses global-level and word-level features. The word-level label is generated by obtaining the minimum axis-aligned rectangle boxes of the shrunk polygon. In the inference period, GWNet only uses global-level features to output simple polygon detections. Experiments on four benchmark datasets, including the MSRA-TD500, Total-Text, ICDAR2015 and CTW-1500, demonstrate that our GWNet outperforms the state-of-the-art detectors. Specifically, with a backbone of ResNet-50, we achieve an F-measure of 88.6% on MSRA- TD500, 87.9% on Total-Text, 89.2% on ICDAR2015 and 87.5% on CTW-1500.
summary: It is an extremely challenging task to detect arbitrary shape text in natural scenes on high accuracy and efficiency. In this paper, we propose a scene text detection framework, namely GWNet, which mainly includes two modules: Global module and RCNN module. Specifically, Global module improves the adaptive performance of the DB (Differentiable Binarization) module by adding k submodule and shift submodule. Two submodules enhance the adaptability of amplifying factor k, accelerate the convergence of models and help to produce more accurate detection results. RCNN module fuses global-level and word-level features. The word-level label is generated by obtaining the minimum axis-aligned rectangle boxes of the shrunk polygon. In the inference period, GWNet only uses global-level features to output simple polygon detections. Experiments on four benchmark datasets, including the MSRA-TD500, Total-Text, ICDAR2015 and CTW-1500, demonstrate that our GWNet outperforms the state-of-the-art detectors. Specifically, with a backbone of ResNet-50, we achieve an F-measure of 88.6% on MSRA- TD500, 87.9% on Total-Text, 89.2% on ICDAR2015 and 87.5% on CTW-1500.
abstract_zh: 在自然场景中高精度、高效率地检测任意形状的文本是一项极具挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种场景文本检测框架，即GWNet，它主要包括两个模块：Global模块和RCNN模块。具体来说，Global模块通过添加k子模块和shift子模块，提高了DB（Differentiable Binarization）模块的自适应性能。两个子模块增强了放大因子k的适应性，加速模型的收敛，有助于产生更准确的检测结果。 RCNN 模块融合了全局级和字级特征。通过获取收缩多边形的最小轴对齐矩形框来生成单词级标签。在推理阶段，GWNet 仅使用全局级特征来输出简单的多边形检测。对四个基准数据集（包括 MSRA-TD500、Total-Text、ICDAR2015 和 CTW-1500）的实验表明，我们的 GWNet 优于最先进的检测器。具体来说，以 ResNet-50 为骨干，我们在 MSRA-TD500 上实现了 88.6% 的 F 测量，在 Total-Text 上实现了 87.9%，在 ICDAR2015 上实现了 89.2%，在 CTW-1500 上实现了 87.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局和单词级特征的实时场景文本检测框架GWNet，用于高效准确地检测自然场景中任意形状的文本。
AI.motivation: 检测自然场景中任意形状文本在准确性和效率上面临极大挑战，现有方法存在适应性不足和收敛速度慢的问题。
AI.method: 框架包含全局模块和RCNN模块：全局模块通过添加k子模块和shift子模块优化DB模块；RCNN模块融合全局级和单词级特征，单词级标签通过收缩多边形的最小轴对齐矩形生成，推理时仅使用全局特征输出简单多边形检测。
AI.result: 在MSRA-TD500、Total-Text、ICDAR2015和CTW-1500四个数据集上，使用ResNet-50骨干网络时F-measure分别达到88.6%、87.9%、89.2%和87.5%，优于现有先进检测器。
AI.conclusion: GWNet通过双模块设计有效提升了文本检测的准确性和效率，在多个基准数据集上验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Xiaohan Lan,Yitian Yuan,Xin Wang,Long Chen,Zhi Wang,Lin Ma,Wenwu Zhu
title: A Closer Look at Debiased Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos: Dataset, Metric, and Approach
title_zh: 仔细观察视频中的有偏差时间句子基础：数据集、指标和方法
abstract: Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos (TSGV), which aims to ground a natural language sentence in an untrimmed video, has drawn widespread attention over the past few years. However, recent studies have found that current benchmark datasets may have obvious moment annotation biases, enabling several simple baselines even without training to achieve SOTA performance. In this paper, we take a closer look at existing evaluation protocols, and find both the prevailing dataset and evaluation metrics are the devils that lead to untrustworthy benchmarking. Therefore, we propose to re-organize the two widely-used datasets, making the ground-truth moment distributions different in the training and test splits, i.e., out-of-distribution (OOD) test. Meanwhile, we introduce a new evaluation metric "dR@n,IoU@m" that discounts the basic recall scores to alleviate the inflating evaluation caused by biased datasets. New benchmarking results indicate that our proposed evaluation protocols can better monitor the research progress. Furthermore, we propose a novel causality-based Multi-branch Deconfounding Debiasing (MDD) framework for unbiased moment prediction. Specifically, we design a multi-branch deconfounder to eliminate the effects caused by multiple confounders with causal intervention. In order to help the model better align the semantics between sentence queries and video moments, we enhance the representations during feature encoding. Specifically, for textual information, the query is parsed into several verb-centered phrases to obtain a more fine-grained textual feature. For visual information, the positional information has been decomposed from moment features to enhance representations of moments with diverse locations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed approach can achieve competitive results among existing SOTA approaches and outperform the base model with great gains.
summary: Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos (TSGV), which aims to ground a natural language sentence in an untrimmed video, has drawn widespread attention over the past few years. However, recent studies have found that current benchmark datasets may have obvious moment annotation biases, enabling several simple baselines even without training to achieve SOTA performance. In this paper, we take a closer look at existing evaluation protocols, and find both the prevailing dataset and evaluation metrics are the devils that lead to untrustworthy benchmarking. Therefore, we propose to re-organize the two widely-used datasets, making the ground-truth moment distributions different in the training and test splits, i.e., out-of-distribution (OOD) test. Meanwhile, we introduce a new evaluation metric "dR@n,IoU@m" that discounts the basic recall scores to alleviate the inflating evaluation caused by biased datasets. New benchmarking results indicate that our proposed evaluation protocols can better monitor the research progress. Furthermore, we propose a novel causality-based Multi-branch Deconfounding Debiasing (MDD) framework for unbiased moment prediction. Specifically, we design a multi-branch deconfounder to eliminate the effects caused by multiple confounders with causal intervention. In order to help the model better align the semantics between sentence queries and video moments, we enhance the representations during feature encoding. Specifically, for textual information, the query is parsed into several verb-centered phrases to obtain a more fine-grained textual feature. For visual information, the positional information has been decomposed from moment features to enhance representations of moments with diverse locations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed approach can achieve competitive results among existing SOTA approaches and outperform the base model with great gains.
abstract_zh: 视频中的时间句子基础（TSGV）旨在在未经修剪的视频中基础自然语言句子，在过去几年引起了广泛的关注。然而，最近的研究发现，当前的基准数据集可能存在明显的矩注释偏差，使得即使没有训练也可以通过几个简单的基线来实现 SOTA 性能。在本文中，我们仔细研究了现有的评估协议，发现流行的数据集和评估指标都是导致基准测试不可信的恶魔。因此，我们建议重新组织两个广泛使用的数据集，使训练和测试分割中的真实矩分布不同，即分布外（OOD）测试。同时，我们引入了一种新的评估指标“dR@n，IoU@m”，该指标对基本召回分数进行折扣，以减轻由偏差数据集引起的夸大评估。新的基准测试结果表明我们提出的评估协议可以更好地监控研究进展。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的基于因果关系的多分支解混去偏（MDD）框架，用于无偏矩预测。具体来说，我们设计了一个多分支去混杂因素，以通过因果干预消除多个混杂因素造成的影响。为了帮助模型更好地对齐句子查询和视频时刻之间的语义，我们在特征编码期间增强了表示。具体来说，对于文本信息，查询被解析为几个以动词为中心的短语，以获得更细粒度的文本特征。对于视觉信息，位置信息已从矩特征分解，以增强不同位置的矩的表示。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以在现有的 SOTA 方法中取得有竞争力的结果，并以巨大的收益超越基础模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决视频中时间句子定位的偏差问题，通过改进数据集、评估指标并提出去偏倚方法以提升模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在标注偏差，导致简单模型也能达到SOTA，需改进评估协议以提升研究可信度。
AI.method: 提出OOD测试数据集、新评估指标dR@n,IoU@m，以及基于因果的MDD框架，包含多分支去混淆和特征增强技术。
AI.result: 实验显示新评估协议有效监控研究进展，MDD方法在SOTA中表现优异，显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 改进的评估协议和去偏倚方法有效提升模型可靠性，为视频时间定位研究提供更可信的基准。

search_text: A Closer Look at Debiased Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos: Dataset, Metric, and Approach 仔细观察视频中的有偏差时间句子基础：数据集、指标和方法 Temporal Sentence Grounding in Videos (TSGV), which aims to ground a natural language sentence in an untrimmed video, has drawn widespread attention over the past few years. However, recent studies have found that current benchmark datasets may have obvious moment annotation biases, enabling several simple baselines even without training to achieve SOTA performance. In this paper, we take a closer look at existing evaluation protocols, and find both the prevailing dataset and evaluation metrics are the devils that lead to untrustworthy benchmarking. Therefore, we propose to re-organize the two widely-used datasets, making the ground-truth moment distributions different in the training and test splits, i.e., out-of-distribution (OOD) test. Meanwhile, we introduce a new evaluation metric "dR@n,IoU@m" that discounts the basic recall scores to alleviate the inflating evaluation caused by biased datasets. New benchmarking results indicate that our proposed evaluation protocols can better monitor the research progress. Furthermore, we propose a novel causality-based Multi-branch Deconfounding Debiasing (MDD) framework for unbiased moment prediction. Specifically, we design a multi-branch deconfounder to eliminate the effects caused by multiple confounders with causal intervention. In order to help the model better align the semantics between sentence queries and video moments, we enhance the representations during feature encoding. Specifically, for textual information, the query is parsed into several verb-centered phrases to obtain a more fine-grained textual feature. For visual information, the positional information has been decomposed from moment features to enhance representations of moments with diverse locations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed approach can achieve competitive results among existing SOTA approaches and outperform the base model with great gains. 视频中的时间句子基础（TSGV）旨在在未经修剪的视频中基础自然语言句子，在过去几年引起了广泛的关注。然而，最近的研究发现，当前的基准数据集可能存在明显的矩注释偏差，使得即使没有训练也可以通过几个简单的基线来实现 SOTA 性能。在本文中，我们仔细研究了现有的评估协议，发现流行的数据集和评估指标都是导致基准测试不可信的恶魔。因此，我们建议重新组织两个广泛使用的数据集，使训练和测试分割中的真实矩分布不同，即分布外（OOD）测试。同时，我们引入了一种新的评估指标“dR@n，IoU@m”，该指标对基本召回分数进行折扣，以减轻由偏差数据集引起的夸大评估。新的基准测试结果表明我们提出的评估协议可以更好地监控研究进展。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的基于因果关系的多分支解混去偏（MDD）框架，用于无偏矩预测。具体来说，我们设计了一个多分支去混杂因素，以通过因果干预消除多个混杂因素造成的影响。为了帮助模型更好地对齐句子查询和视频时刻之间的语义，我们在特征编码期间增强了表示。具体来说，对于文本信息，查询被解析为几个以动词为中心的短语，以获得更细粒度的文本特征。对于视觉信息，位置信息已从矩特征分解，以增强不同位置的矩的表示。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以在现有的 SOTA 方法中取得有竞争力的结果，并以巨大的收益超越基础模型。 本文旨在解决视频中时间句子定位的偏差问题，通过改进数据集、评估指标并提出去偏倚方法以提升模型可靠性。 Xiaohan Lan,Yitian Yuan,Xin Wang,Long Chen,Zhi Wang,Lin Ma,Wenwu Zhu cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.MM

authors_text: Xiuwei Xu,Yifan Wang,Yu Zheng,Yongming Rao,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: Back to Reality: Weakly-supervised 3D Object Detection with Shape-guided Label Enhancement
title_zh: 回到现实：具有形状引导标签增强功能的弱监督 3D 物体检测
abstract: In this paper, we propose a weakly-supervised approach for 3D object detection, which makes it possible to train a strong 3D detector with position-level annotations (i.e. annotations of object centers). In order to remedy the information loss from box annotations to centers, our method, namely Back to Reality (BR), makes use of synthetic 3D shapes to convert the weak labels into fully-annotated virtual scenes as stronger supervision, and in turn utilizes the perfect virtual labels to complement and refine the real labels. Specifically, we first assemble 3D shapes into physically reasonable virtual scenes according to the coarse scene layout extracted from position-level annotations. Then we go back to reality by applying a virtual-to-real domain adaptation method, which refine the weak labels and additionally supervise the training of detector with the virtual scenes. Furthermore, we propose a more challenging benckmark for indoor 3D object detection with more diversity in object sizes to better show the potential of BR. With less than 5% of the labeling labor, we achieve comparable detection performance with some popular fully-supervised approaches on the widely used ScanNet dataset. Code is available at: https://github.com/wyf-ACCEPT/BackToReality
summary: In this paper, we propose a weakly-supervised approach for 3D object detection, which makes it possible to train a strong 3D detector with position-level annotations (i.e. annotations of object centers). In order to remedy the information loss from box annotations to centers, our method, namely Back to Reality (BR), makes use of synthetic 3D shapes to convert the weak labels into fully-annotated virtual scenes as stronger supervision, and in turn utilizes the perfect virtual labels to complement and refine the real labels. Specifically, we first assemble 3D shapes into physically reasonable virtual scenes according to the coarse scene layout extracted from position-level annotations. Then we go back to reality by applying a virtual-to-real domain adaptation method, which refine the weak labels and additionally supervise the training of detector with the virtual scenes. Furthermore, we propose a more challenging benckmark for indoor 3D object detection with more diversity in object sizes to better show the potential of BR. With less than 5% of the labeling labor, we achieve comparable detection performance with some popular fully-supervised approaches on the widely used ScanNet dataset. Code is available at: https://github.com/wyf-ACCEPT/BackToReality
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 对象检测的弱监督方法，这使得训练具有位置级注释（即对象中心注释）的强大 3D 检测器成为可能。为了弥补框​​标注到中心的信息丢失，我们的方法，即回到现实（BR），利用合成的3D形状将弱标签转换为全标注的虚拟场景作为更强的监督，进而利用完美的虚拟标签来补充和细化真实标签。具体来说，我们首先根据从位置级注释中提取的粗略场景布局将 3D 形状组装成物理上合理的虚拟场景。然后我们通过应用虚拟到真实域适应方法回到现实，该方法细化弱标签并另外监督虚拟场景中检测器的训练。此外，我们提出了一个更具挑战性的室内 3D 物体检测基准，具有更多的物体尺寸多样性，以更好地展示 BR 的潜力。我们用不到 5% 的标记工作量，在广泛使用的 ScanNet 数据集上实现了与一些流行的完全监督方法相当的检测性能。代码位于：https://github.com/wyf-ACCEPT/BackToReality

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督的3D目标检测方法，通过形状引导的标签增强，利用位置级标注训练高性能检测器。
AI.motivation: 传统3D检测依赖详尽标注，成本高。本文旨在降低标注需求，利用弱监督方法提升效率。
AI.method: 方法BR利用合成3D形状生成虚拟场景，通过虚拟到现实的领域适应优化弱标签，并构建更复杂的室内检测基准。
AI.result: 在ScanNet上，使用不足5%标注量，检测性能与主流全监督方法相当。
AI.conclusion: BR方法有效，证明弱监督可行性，并提供新基准促进研究。

authors_text: Junlin Liu,Xinchen Lyu,Qimei Cui,Xiaofeng Tao
title: Similarity-based Label Inference Attack against Training and Inference of Split Learning
title_zh: 针对分裂学习训练和推理的基于相似性的标签推理攻击
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security, vol. 19, pp. 2881-2895, 2024
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security, vol. 19, pp. 2881-2895, 2024
abstract: Split learning is a promising paradigm for privacy-preserving distributed learning. The learning model can be cut into multiple portions to be collaboratively trained at the participants by exchanging only the intermediate results at the cut layer. Understanding the security performance of split learning is critical for many privacy-sensitive applications. This paper shows that the exchanged intermediate results, including the smashed data (i.e., extracted features from the raw data) and gradients during training and inference of split learning, can already reveal the private labels. We mathematically analyze the potential label leakages and propose the cosine and Euclidean similarity measurements for gradients and smashed data, respectively. Then, the two similarity measurements are shown to be unified in Euclidean space. Based on the similarity metric, we design three label inference attacks to efficiently recover the private labels during both the training and inference phases. Experimental results validate that the proposed approaches can achieve close to 100% accuracy of label attacks. The proposed attack can still achieve accurate predictions against various state-of-the-art defense mechanisms, including DP-SGD, label differential privacy, gradient compression, and Marvell.
summary: Split learning is a promising paradigm for privacy-preserving distributed learning. The learning model can be cut into multiple portions to be collaboratively trained at the participants by exchanging only the intermediate results at the cut layer. Understanding the security performance of split learning is critical for many privacy-sensitive applications. This paper shows that the exchanged intermediate results, including the smashed data (i.e., extracted features from the raw data) and gradients during training and inference of split learning, can already reveal the private labels. We mathematically analyze the potential label leakages and propose the cosine and Euclidean similarity measurements for gradients and smashed data, respectively. Then, the two similarity measurements are shown to be unified in Euclidean space. Based on the similarity metric, we design three label inference attacks to efficiently recover the private labels during both the training and inference phases. Experimental results validate that the proposed approaches can achieve close to 100% accuracy of label attacks. The proposed attack can still achieve accurate predictions against various state-of-the-art defense mechanisms, including DP-SGD, label differential privacy, gradient compression, and Marvell.
abstract_zh: 分割学习是保护隐私的分布式学习的一种有前途的范例。学习模型可以被切割成多个部分，通过仅交换切割层的中间结果来在参与者处进行协作训练。了解分割学习的安全性能对于许多隐私敏感的应用程序至关重要。本文表明，分割学习的训练和推理过程中交换的中间结果，包括粉碎数据（即从原始数据中提取的特征）和梯度，已经可以揭示私有标签。我们对潜在的标签泄漏进行了数学分析，并分别提出了梯度和粉碎数据的余弦和欧几里得相似度测量。然后，两个相似性测量在欧几里德空间中被证明是统一的。基于相似性度量，我们设计了三种标签推理攻击，以在训练和推理阶段有效地恢复私有标签。实验结果验证了所提出的方法可以实现接近 100% 的标签攻击准确率。所提出的攻击仍然可以针对各种最先进的防御机制实现准确的预测，包括 DP-SGD、标签差分隐私、梯度压缩和 Marvell。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于相似性的标签推断攻击方法，揭示分割学习中训练和推理阶段交换的中间结果存在隐私标签泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 分割学习虽能保护数据隐私，但其交换的中间特征和梯度可能泄露敏感标签，需评估其安全性能以保障隐私敏感应用。
AI.method: 通过数学分析标签泄露潜力，提出余弦相似度（梯度）和欧氏相似度（特征）度量方法，并统一到欧氏空间，设计三种标签推断攻击算法。
AI.result: 实验表明攻击方法在训练和推理阶段均能实现近100%标签恢复准确率，且能突破DP-SGD、梯度压缩等主流防御机制。
AI.conclusion: 分割学习的中间结果存在严重隐私泄露风险，现有防御手段效果有限，需进一步研究更安全的隐私保护机制。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于相似性的标签推断攻击方法，揭示分割学习中训练和推理阶段交换的中间结果存在隐私标签泄露风险。
ai_content.motivation: 分割学习虽能保护数据隐私，但其交换的中间特征和梯度可能泄露敏感标签，需评估其安全性能以保障隐私敏感应用。
ai_content.method: 通过数学分析标签泄露潜力，提出余弦相似度（梯度）和欧氏相似度（特征）度量方法，并统一到欧氏空间，设计三种标签推断攻击算法。
ai_content.result: 实验表明攻击方法在训练和推理阶段均能实现近100%标签恢复准确率，且能突破DP-SGD、梯度压缩等主流防御机制。
ai_content.conclusion: 分割学习的中间结果存在严重隐私泄露风险，现有防御手段效果有限，需进一步研究更安全的隐私保护机制。

search_text: Similarity-based Label Inference Attack against Training and Inference of Split Learning 针对分裂学习训练和推理的基于相似性的标签推理攻击 Split learning is a promising paradigm for privacy-preserving distributed learning. The learning model can be cut into multiple portions to be collaboratively trained at the participants by exchanging only the intermediate results at the cut layer. Understanding the security performance of split learning is critical for many privacy-sensitive applications. This paper shows that the exchanged intermediate results, including the smashed data (i.e., extracted features from the raw data) and gradients during training and inference of split learning, can already reveal the private labels. We mathematically analyze the potential label leakages and propose the cosine and Euclidean similarity measurements for gradients and smashed data, respectively. Then, the two similarity measurements are shown to be unified in Euclidean space. Based on the similarity metric, we design three label inference attacks to efficiently recover the private labels during both the training and inference phases. Experimental results validate that the proposed approaches can achieve close to 100% accuracy of label attacks. The proposed attack can still achieve accurate predictions against various state-of-the-art defense mechanisms, including DP-SGD, label differential privacy, gradient compression, and Marvell. 分割学习是保护隐私的分布式学习的一种有前途的范例。学习模型可以被切割成多个部分，通过仅交换切割层的中间结果来在参与者处进行协作训练。了解分割学习的安全性能对于许多隐私敏感的应用程序至关重要。本文表明，分割学习的训练和推理过程中交换的中间结果，包括粉碎数据（即从原始数据中提取的特征）和梯度，已经可以揭示私有标签。我们对潜在的标签泄漏进行了数学分析，并分别提出了梯度和粉碎数据的余弦和欧几里得相似度测量。然后，两个相似性测量在欧几里德空间中被证明是统一的。基于相似性度量，我们设计了三种标签推理攻击，以在训练和推理阶段有效地恢复私有标签。实验结果验证了所提出的方法可以实现接近 100% 的标签攻击准确率。所提出的攻击仍然可以针对各种最先进的防御机制实现准确的预测，包括 DP-SGD、标签差分隐私、梯度压缩和 Marvell。 本文提出基于相似性的标签推断攻击方法，揭示分割学习中训练和推理阶段交换的中间结果存在隐私标签泄露风险。 Junlin Liu,Xinchen Lyu,Qimei Cui,Xiaofeng Tao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Saeed Ranjbar Alvar,Lanjun Wang,Jian Pei,Yong Zhang
title: Membership Privacy Protection for Image Translation Models via Adversarial Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过对抗性知识蒸馏对图像翻译模型进行会员隐私保护
abstract: Image-to-image translation models are shown to be vulnerable to the Membership Inference Attack (MIA), in which the adversary's goal is to identify whether a sample is used to train the model or not. With daily increasing applications based on image-to-image translation models, it is crucial to protect the privacy of these models against MIAs. We propose adversarial knowledge distillation (AKD) as a defense method against MIAs for image-to-image translation models. The proposed method protects the privacy of the training samples by improving the generalizability of the model. We conduct experiments on the image-to-image translation models and show that AKD achieves the state-of-the-art utility-privacy tradeoff by reducing the attack performance up to 38.9% compared with the regular training model at the cost of a slight drop in the quality of the generated output images. The experimental results also indicate that the models trained by AKD generalize better than the regular training models. Furthermore, compared with existing defense methods, the results show that at the same privacy protection level, image translation models trained by AKD generate outputs with higher quality; while at the same quality of outputs, AKD enhances the privacy protection over 30%.
summary: Image-to-image translation models are shown to be vulnerable to the Membership Inference Attack (MIA), in which the adversary's goal is to identify whether a sample is used to train the model or not. With daily increasing applications based on image-to-image translation models, it is crucial to protect the privacy of these models against MIAs. We propose adversarial knowledge distillation (AKD) as a defense method against MIAs for image-to-image translation models. The proposed method protects the privacy of the training samples by improving the generalizability of the model. We conduct experiments on the image-to-image translation models and show that AKD achieves the state-of-the-art utility-privacy tradeoff by reducing the attack performance up to 38.9% compared with the regular training model at the cost of a slight drop in the quality of the generated output images. The experimental results also indicate that the models trained by AKD generalize better than the regular training models. Furthermore, compared with existing defense methods, the results show that at the same privacy protection level, image translation models trained by AKD generate outputs with higher quality; while at the same quality of outputs, AKD enhances the privacy protection over 30%.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像转换模型容易受到成员推理攻击 (MIA) 的攻击，其中攻击者的目标是确定样本是否用于训练模型。随着基于图像到图像转换模型的应用程序日益增多，保护这些模型的隐私免受 MIA 的影响至关重要。我们提出对抗性知识蒸馏（AKD）作为针对图像到图像翻译模型的 MIA 的防御方法。该方法通过提高模型的泛化性来保护训练样本的隐私。我们对图像到图像转换模型进行了实验，结果表明，与常规训练模型相比，AKD 实现了最先进的实用性与隐私权衡，将攻击性能降低了 38.9%，但代价是生成的输出图像的质量略有下降。实验结果还表明，AKD 训练的模型比常规训练模型具有更好的泛化能力。此外，与现有的防御方法相比，结果表明，在相同的隐私保护级别下，AKD训练的图像翻译模型生成的输出质量更高；而在同等输出质量下，AKD将隐私保护提升30%以上。

AI.tldr: 通过对抗性知识蒸馏方法保护图像翻译模型的隐私，防止成员推理攻击。
AI.motivation: 图像翻译模型易受成员推理攻击，需保护训练数据隐私以确保应用安全。
AI.method: 采用对抗性知识蒸馏（AKD）方法，提升模型泛化能力以保护训练样本隐私。
AI.result: 实验表明AKD在降低攻击性能38.9%的同时，图像质量略有下降，且在相同隐私水平下生成质量更高，或相同质量下隐私保护增强超30%。
AI.conclusion: AKD在隐私保护与生成质量间达到最优平衡，优于现有防御方法。

authors_text: Hui Tang,Li Chai,Wanli Lu
title: Transferring Dual Stochastic Graph Convolutional Network for Facial Micro-expression Recognition
title_zh: 迁移双随机图卷积网络进行面部微表情识别
abstract: Micro-expression recognition has drawn increasing attention due to its wide application in lie detection, criminal detection and psychological consultation. To improve the recognition performance of the small micro-expression data, this paper presents a transferring dual stochastic Graph Convolutional Network (TDSGCN) model. We propose a stochastic graph construction method and dual graph convolutional network to extract more discriminative features from the micro-expression images. We use transfer learning to pre-train SGCNs from macro expression data. Optical flow algorithm is also integrated to extract their temporal features. We fuse both spatial and temporal features to improve the recognition performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to utilize the transferring learning and graph convolutional network in micro-expression recognition task. In addition, to handle the class imbalance problem of dataset, we focus on the design of focal loss function. Through extensive evaluation, our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on SAMM and recently released MMEW benchmarks. Our code will be publicly available accompanying this paper.
summary: Micro-expression recognition has drawn increasing attention due to its wide application in lie detection, criminal detection and psychological consultation. To improve the recognition performance of the small micro-expression data, this paper presents a transferring dual stochastic Graph Convolutional Network (TDSGCN) model. We propose a stochastic graph construction method and dual graph convolutional network to extract more discriminative features from the micro-expression images. We use transfer learning to pre-train SGCNs from macro expression data. Optical flow algorithm is also integrated to extract their temporal features. We fuse both spatial and temporal features to improve the recognition performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to utilize the transferring learning and graph convolutional network in micro-expression recognition task. In addition, to handle the class imbalance problem of dataset, we focus on the design of focal loss function. Through extensive evaluation, our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on SAMM and recently released MMEW benchmarks. Our code will be publicly available accompanying this paper.
abstract_zh: 微表情识别因其在测谎、刑事侦查、心理咨询等方面的广泛应用而受到越来越多的关注。为了提高小微表情数据的识别性能，提出一种传输双随机图卷积网络（TDSGCN）模型。我们提出了一种随机图构造方法和对偶图卷积网络来从微表情图像中提取更多判别性特征。我们使用迁移学习从宏表达数据中预训练 SGCN。还集成了光流算法来提取它们的时间特征。我们融合空间和时间特征来提高识别性能。据我们所知，这是在微表情识别任务中利用迁移学习和图卷积网络的首次尝试。此外，为了处理数据集的类别不平衡问题，我们重点关注焦点损失函数的设计。通过广泛的评估，我们提出的方法在 SAMM 和最近发布的 MMEW 基准上实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码将随本文一起公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出迁移双随机图卷积网络（TDSGCN）模型，用于解决微表情识别中数据量小、特征提取困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 微表情数据量小且特征复杂，传统方法难以有效提取时空特征，导致识别性能受限。
AI.method: 设计随机图构建方法与双图卷积网络提取空间特征，结合光流算法提取时间特征，并通过迁移学习预训练模型；采用焦点损失函数解决类别不平衡问题，最终融合时空特征提升识别效果。
AI.result: 在SAMM和MMEW数据集上达到最先进性能，代码将公开共享。
AI.conclusion: 首次将迁移学习与图卷积网络结合应用于微表情识别，有效提升模型性能，为相关领域提供新思路。

Our code will be publicly available accompanying this paper. 微表情识别因其在测谎、刑事侦查、心理咨询等方面的广泛应用而受到越来越多的关注。为了提高小微表情数据的识别性能，提出一种传输双随机图卷积网络（TDSGCN）模型。我们提出了一种随机图构造方法和对偶图卷积网络来从微表情图像中提取更多判别性特征。我们使用迁移学习从宏表达数据中预训练 SGCN。还集成了光流算法来提取它们的时间特征。我们融合空间和时间特征来提高识别性能。据我们所知，这是在微表情识别任务中利用迁移学习和图卷积网络的首次尝试。此外，为了处理数据集的类别不平衡问题，我们重点关注焦点损失函数的设计。通过广泛的评估，我们提出的方法在 SAMM 和最近发布的 MMEW 基准上实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码将随本文一起公开发布。 本文提出迁移双随机图卷积网络（TDSGCN）模型，用于解决微表情识别中数据量小、特征提取困难的问题。 Hui Tang,Li Chai,Wanli Lu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Abhishek Peri,Kinal Mehta,Avneesh Mishra,Michael Milford,Sourav Garg,K. Madhava Krishna
title: ReF -- Rotation Equivariant Features for Local Feature Matching
title_zh: ReF——用于局部特征匹配的旋转等变特征
abstract: Sparse local feature matching is pivotal for many computer vision and robotics tasks. To improve their invariance to challenging appearance conditions and viewing angles, and hence their usefulness, existing learning-based methods have primarily focused on data augmentation-based training. In this work, we propose an alternative, complementary approach that centers on inducing bias in the model architecture itself to generate `rotation-specific' features using Steerable E2-CNNs, that are then group-pooled to achieve rotation-invariant local features. We demonstrate that this high performance, rotation-specific coverage from the steerable CNNs can be expanded to all rotation angles by combining it with augmentation-trained standard CNNs which have broader coverage but are often inaccurate, thus creating a state-of-the-art rotation-robust local feature matcher. We benchmark our proposed methods against existing techniques on HPatches and a newly proposed UrbanScenes3D-Air dataset for visual place recognition. Furthermore, we present a detailed analysis of the performance effects of ensembling, robust estimation, network architecture variations, and the use of rotation priors.
summary: Sparse local feature matching is pivotal for many computer vision and robotics tasks. To improve their invariance to challenging appearance conditions and viewing angles, and hence their usefulness, existing learning-based methods have primarily focused on data augmentation-based training. In this work, we propose an alternative, complementary approach that centers on inducing bias in the model architecture itself to generate `rotation-specific' features using Steerable E2-CNNs, that are then group-pooled to achieve rotation-invariant local features. We demonstrate that this high performance, rotation-specific coverage from the steerable CNNs can be expanded to all rotation angles by combining it with augmentation-trained standard CNNs which have broader coverage but are often inaccurate, thus creating a state-of-the-art rotation-robust local feature matcher. We benchmark our proposed methods against existing techniques on HPatches and a newly proposed UrbanScenes3D-Air dataset for visual place recognition. Furthermore, we present a detailed analysis of the performance effects of ensembling, robust estimation, network architecture variations, and the use of rotation priors.
abstract_zh: 稀疏局部特征匹配对于许多计算机视觉和机器人任务至关重要。为了提高其对具有挑战性的外观条件和视角的不变性，从而提高其实用性，现有的基于学习的方法主要集中于基于数据增强的训练。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种替代性的补充方法，该方法的重点是在模型架构本身中引入偏差，以使用可转向 E2-CNN 生成“特定于旋转”的特征，然后将这些特征进行分组以实现旋转不变的局部特征。我们证明，通过与经过增强训练的标准 CNN 相结合，可操纵 CNN 的这种高性能、特定于旋转的覆盖范围可以扩展到所有旋转角度，标准 CNN 具有更广泛的覆盖范围，但通常不准确，从而创建了最先进的旋转鲁棒局部特征匹配器。我们将我们提出的方法与 HPatches 上的现有技术和新提出的用于视觉地点识别的 UrbanScenes3D-Air 数据集进行基准测试。此外，我们还详细分析了集成、鲁棒估计、网络架构变化和旋转先验的使用的性能影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于旋转等变特征的局部特征匹配方法ReF，通过结合可旋转卷积网络与标准卷积网络提升旋转鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于数据增强的方法在应对复杂视角变化时存在覆盖范围与准确率的权衡问题，需通过模型结构改进直接提升旋转不变性。
AI.method: 利用Steerable E2-CNN生成旋转特定特征并分组池化获得旋转不变特征，结合增强训练的标准CNN实现全角度覆盖，形成集成匹配器。
AI.result: 在HPatches和UrbanScenes3D-Air数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了旋转等变特征与标准CNN集成的有效性，并分析了多种因素对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 结构设计与数据增强的结合能显著提升旋转鲁棒性，旋转等变特征与标准特征的互补性为局部匹配提供了新思路。

authors_text: Itzik Wilf,Nati Daniel,Lin Manqing,Firas Shama,Omri Asraf,Feng Wensen,Ofer Kruzel
title: Crowd Source Scene Change Detection and Local Map Update
title_zh: 人群源场景变化检测和本地地图更新
abstract: As scene changes with time map descriptors become outdated, affecting VPS localization accuracy. In this work, we propose an approach to detect structural and texture scene changes to be followed by map update. In our method - map includes 3D points with descriptors generated either via LiDAR or SFM. Common approaches suffer from shortcomings: 1) Direct comparison of the two point-clouds for change detection is slow due to the need to build new point-cloud every time we want to compare; 2) Image based comparison requires to keep the map images adding substantial storage overhead. To circumvent this problems, we propose an approach based on point-clouds descriptors comparison: 1) Based on VPS poses select close query and map images pairs, 2) Registration of query images to map image descriptors, 3) Use segmentation to filter out dynamic or short term temporal changes, 4) Compare the descriptors between corresponding segments.
summary: As scene changes with time map descriptors become outdated, affecting VPS localization accuracy. In this work, we propose an approach to detect structural and texture scene changes to be followed by map update. In our method - map includes 3D points with descriptors generated either via LiDAR or SFM. Common approaches suffer from shortcomings: 1) Direct comparison of the two point-clouds for change detection is slow due to the need to build new point-cloud every time we want to compare; 2) Image based comparison requires to keep the map images adding substantial storage overhead. To circumvent this problems, we propose an approach based on point-clouds descriptors comparison: 1) Based on VPS poses select close query and map images pairs, 2) Registration of query images to map image descriptors, 3) Use segmentation to filter out dynamic or short term temporal changes, 4) Compare the descriptors between corresponding segments.
abstract_zh: 随着场景随时间变化，地图描述符变得过时，影响 VPS 定位精度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法来检测结构和纹理场景变化，然后进行地图更新。在我们的方法中，地图包括带有通过 LiDAR 或 SFM 生成的描述符的 3D 点。常见方法存在以下缺点： 1）直接比较两个点云进行变化检测速度很慢，因为每次需要比较时都需要构建新的点云； 2）基于图像的比较需要保留地图图像，增加了大量的存储开销。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于点云描述符比较的方法：1）基于VPS姿势选择紧密的查询和映射图像对，2）注册查询图像以映射图像描述符，3）使用分割来过滤动态或短期时间变化，4）比较相应片段之间的描述符。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于点云描述符比较的场景变化检测与局部地图更新方法，以提高视觉定位系统的准确性。
AI.motivation: 随时间推移场景变化会导致地图描述符过时，影响视觉定位系统（VPS）的定位精度，传统方法存在计算效率低和存储开销大的问题。
AI.method: 1) 利用VPS位姿选取相近查询图像与地图图像对；2) 将查询图像注册到地图描述符；3) 通过分割过滤动态或短期变化；4) 比较对应分割区域的描述符差异。
AI.result: 该方法有效检测结构和纹理变化，减少点云重建频率及图像存储需求，提升地图更新效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的描述符比较方法克服了传统点云直接对比和图像存储的局限性，为动态环境下的地图维护提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yang Jiao,Shaoxiang Chen,Zequn Jie,Jingjing Chen,Lin Ma,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: MORE: Multi-Order RElation Mining for Dense Captioning in 3D Scenes
title_zh: 更多：3D 场景中密集字幕的多阶关系挖掘
abstract: 3D dense captioning is a recently-proposed novel task, where point clouds contain more geometric information than the 2D counterpart. However, it is also more challenging due to the higher complexity and wider variety of inter-object relations contained in point clouds. Existing methods only treat such relations as by-products of object feature learning in graphs without specifically encoding them, which leads to sub-optimal results. In this paper, aiming at improving 3D dense captioning via capturing and utilizing the complex relations in the 3D scene, we propose MORE, a Multi-Order RElation mining model, to support generating more descriptive and comprehensive captions. Technically, our MORE encodes object relations in a progressive manner since complex relations can be deduced from a limited number of basic ones. We first devise a novel Spatial Layout Graph Convolution (SLGC), which semantically encodes several first-order relations as edges of a graph constructed over 3D object proposals. Next, from the resulting graph, we further extract multiple triplets which encapsulate basic first-order relations as the basic unit, and construct several Object-centric Triplet Attention Graphs (OTAG) to infer multi-order relations for every target object. The updated node features from OTAG are aggregated and fed into the caption decoder to provide abundant relational cues, so that captions including diverse relations with context objects can be generated. Extensive experiments on the Scan2Cap dataset prove the effectiveness of our proposed MORE and its components, and we also outperform the current state-of-the-art method. Our code is available at https://github.com/SxJyJay/MORE.
summary: 3D dense captioning is a recently-proposed novel task, where point clouds contain more geometric information than the 2D counterpart. However, it is also more challenging due to the higher complexity and wider variety of inter-object relations contained in point clouds. Existing methods only treat such relations as by-products of object feature learning in graphs without specifically encoding them, which leads to sub-optimal results. In this paper, aiming at improving 3D dense captioning via capturing and utilizing the complex relations in the 3D scene, we propose MORE, a Multi-Order RElation mining model, to support generating more descriptive and comprehensive captions. Technically, our MORE encodes object relations in a progressive manner since complex relations can be deduced from a limited number of basic ones. We first devise a novel Spatial Layout Graph Convolution (SLGC), which semantically encodes several first-order relations as edges of a graph constructed over 3D object proposals. Next, from the resulting graph, we further extract multiple triplets which encapsulate basic first-order relations as the basic unit, and construct several Object-centric Triplet Attention Graphs (OTAG) to infer multi-order relations for every target object. The updated node features from OTAG are aggregated and fed into the caption decoder to provide abundant relational cues, so that captions including diverse relations with context objects can be generated. Extensive experiments on the Scan2Cap dataset prove the effectiveness of our proposed MORE and its components, and we also outperform the current state-of-the-art method. Our code is available at https://github.com/SxJyJay/MORE.
abstract_zh: 3D 密集字幕是最近提出的一项新颖任务，其中点云比 2D 对应物包含更多的几何信息。然而，由于点云中包含的更高复杂性和更广泛的对象间关系，它也更具挑战性。现有方法仅将此类关系视为图中对象特征学习的副产品，而没有对其进行专门编码，这会导致次优结果。在本文中，旨在通过捕获和利用 3D 场景中的复杂关系来改进 3D 密集字幕，我们提出了 MORE，一种多阶关系挖掘模型，以支持生成更具描述性和更全面的字幕。从技术上讲，我们的 MORE 以渐进的方式对对象关系进行编码，因为复杂的关系可以从有限数量的基本关系中推导出来。我们首先设计了一种新颖的空间布局图卷积（SLGC），它在语义上将几个一阶关系编码为通过 3D 对象提案构建的图的边缘。接下来，从结果图中，我们进一步提取封装基本一阶关系的多个三元组作为基本单元，并构建多个以对象为中心的三元组注意力图（OTAG）来推断每个目标对象的多阶关系。来自 OTAG 的更新节点特征被聚合并输入到字幕解码器中以提供丰富的关系线索，从而可以生成包含与上下文对象的多种关系的字幕。 Scan2Cap 数据集上的大量实验证明了我们提出的 MORE 及其组件的有效性，并且我们也优于当前最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/SxJyJay/MORE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MORE模型，通过挖掘3D场景中多阶物体关系，提升点云密集 captioning 的描述能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未显式编码3D点云中复杂的物体间关系，导致生成的 caption 缺乏上下文关联性，无法充分利用几何信息。
AI.method: 设计空间布局图卷积（SLGC）编码一阶关系，构建以物体为中心的三元组注意力图（OTAG）推理多阶关系，通过分层图结构聚合关系特征生成 caption。
AI.result: 在Scan2Cap数据集上超越当前最优方法，生成的 caption 包含更丰富的物体间关系描述。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模多阶物体关系能有效提升3D密集 captioning 的语义表达能力，为复杂场景理解提供新思路。

search_text: MORE: Multi-Order RElation Mining for Dense Captioning in 3D Scenes 更多：3D 场景中密集字幕的多阶关系挖掘 3D dense captioning is a recently-proposed novel task, where point clouds contain more geometric information than the 2D counterpart. However, it is also more challenging due to the higher complexity and wider variety of inter-object relations contained in point clouds. Existing methods only treat such relations as by-products of object feature learning in graphs without specifically encoding them, which leads to sub-optimal results. In this paper, aiming at improving 3D dense captioning via capturing and utilizing the complex relations in the 3D scene, we propose MORE, a Multi-Order RElation mining model, to support generating more descriptive and comprehensive captions. Technically, our MORE encodes object relations in a progressive manner since complex relations can be deduced from a limited number of basic ones. We first devise a novel Spatial Layout Graph Convolution (SLGC), which semantically encodes several first-order relations as edges of a graph constructed over 3D object proposals. Next, from the resulting graph, we further extract multiple triplets which encapsulate basic first-order relations as the basic unit, and construct several Object-centric Triplet Attention Graphs (OTAG) to infer multi-order relations for every target object. The updated node features from OTAG are aggregated and fed into the caption decoder to provide abundant relational cues, so that captions including diverse relations with context objects can be generated. Extensive experiments on the Scan2Cap dataset prove the effectiveness of our proposed MORE and its components, and we also outperform the current state-of-the-art method. Our code is available at https://github.com/SxJyJay/MORE. 3D 密集字幕是最近提出的一项新颖任务，其中点云比 2D 对应物包含更多的几何信息。然而，由于点云中包含的更高复杂性和更广泛的对象间关系，它也更具挑战性。现有方法仅将此类关系视为图中对象特征学习的副产品，而没有对其进行专门编码，这会导致次优结果。在本文中，旨在通过捕获和利用 3D 场景中的复杂关系来改进 3D 密集字幕，我们提出了 MORE，一种多阶关系挖掘模型，以支持生成更具描述性和更全面的字幕。从技术上讲，我们的 MORE 以渐进的方式对对象关系进行编码，因为复杂的关系可以从有限数量的基本关系中推导出来。我们首先设计了一种新颖的空间布局图卷积（SLGC），它在语义上将几个一阶关系编码为通过 3D 对象提案构建的图的边缘。接下来，从结果图中，我们进一步提取封装基本一阶关系的多个三元组作为基本单元，并构建多个以对象为中心的三元组注意力图（OTAG）来推断每个目标对象的多阶关系。来自 OTAG 的更新节点特征被聚合并输入到字幕解码器中以提供丰富的关系线索，从而可以生成包含与上下文对象的多种关系的字幕。 Scan2Cap 数据集上的大量实验证明了我们提出的 MORE 及其组件的有效性，并且我们也优于当前最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/SxJyJay/MORE 获取。 本文提出MORE模型，通过挖掘3D场景中多阶物体关系，提升点云密集 captioning 的描述能力。 Yang Jiao,Shaoxiang Chen,Zequn Jie,Jingjing Chen,Lin Ma,Yu-Gang Jiang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Gao-Dong Liu,Wan-Lei Zhao,Jie Zhao
title: Online Deep Metric Learning via Mutual Distillation
title_zh: 通过相互蒸馏进行在线深度度量学习
abstract: Deep metric learning aims to transform input data into an embedding space, where similar samples are close while dissimilar samples are far apart from each other. In practice, samples of new categories arrive incrementally, which requires the periodical augmentation of the learned model. The fine-tuning on the new categories usually leads to poor performance on the old, which is known as "catastrophic forgetting". Existing solutions either retrain the model from scratch or require the replay of old samples during the training. In this paper, a complete online deep metric learning framework is proposed based on mutual distillation for both one-task and multi-task scenarios. Different from the teacher-student framework, the proposed approach treats the old and new learning tasks with equal importance. No preference over the old or new knowledge is caused. In addition, a novel virtual feature estimation approach is proposed to recover the features assumed to be extracted by the old models. It allows the distillation between the new and the old models without the replay of old training samples or the holding of old models during the training. A comprehensive study shows the superior performance of our approach with the support of different backbones.
summary: Deep metric learning aims to transform input data into an embedding space, where similar samples are close while dissimilar samples are far apart from each other. In practice, samples of new categories arrive incrementally, which requires the periodical augmentation of the learned model. The fine-tuning on the new categories usually leads to poor performance on the old, which is known as "catastrophic forgetting". Existing solutions either retrain the model from scratch or require the replay of old samples during the training. In this paper, a complete online deep metric learning framework is proposed based on mutual distillation for both one-task and multi-task scenarios. Different from the teacher-student framework, the proposed approach treats the old and new learning tasks with equal importance. No preference over the old or new knowledge is caused. In addition, a novel virtual feature estimation approach is proposed to recover the features assumed to be extracted by the old models. It allows the distillation between the new and the old models without the replay of old training samples or the holding of old models during the training. A comprehensive study shows the superior performance of our approach with the support of different backbones.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习旨在将输入数据转换为嵌入空间，其中相似的样本接近，而不同的样本彼此远离。在实践中，新类别的样本会逐渐到达，这需要定期增强学习模型。对新类别的微调通常会导致旧类别的表现不佳，这被称为“灾难性遗忘”。现有的解决方案要么从头开始重新训练模型，要么需要在训练期间重播旧样本。本文提出了一种基于相互蒸馏的完整在线深度度量学习框架，适用于单任务和多任务场景。与师生框架不同，所提出的方法同等重视新旧学习任务。不会产生对旧知识或新知识的偏好。此外，还提出了一种新颖的虚拟特征估计方法来恢复旧模型提取的特征。它允许新旧模型之间的蒸馏，而无需重放旧训练样本或在训练期间保留旧模型。一项全面的研究表明，在不同骨干的支持下，我们的方法具有卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相互蒸馏的在线深度度量学习框架，用于处理增量新类别时避免灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法在增量学习时会导致旧类别性能下降（灾难性遗忘），现有解决方案需重训练或回放旧样本，存在效率或存储问题。
AI.method: 通过相互蒸馏机制平衡新旧任务重要性，提出虚拟特征估计方法，在无需回放旧样本或保存旧模型的情况下实现新旧模型间知识蒸馏。
AI.result: 在多种主干网络支持下，该方法在增量学习场景中表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了在线深度度量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，无需存储旧数据或模型即可实现持续学习。

In practice, samples of new categories arrive incrementally, which requires the periodical augmentation of the learned model. The fine-tuning on the new categories usually leads to poor performance on the old, which is known as "catastrophic forgetting". Existing solutions either retrain the model from scratch or require the replay of old samples during the training. In this paper, a complete online deep metric learning framework is proposed based on mutual distillation for both one-task and multi-task scenarios. Different from the teacher-student framework, the proposed approach treats the old and new learning tasks with equal importance. No preference over the old or new knowledge is caused. In addition, a novel virtual feature estimation approach is proposed to recover the features assumed to be extracted by the old models. It allows the distillation between the new and the old models without the replay of old training samples or the holding of old models during the training. A comprehensive study shows the superior performance of our approach with the support of different backbones. 深度度量学习旨在将输入数据转换为嵌入空间，其中相似的样本接近，而不同的样本彼此远离。在实践中，新类别的样本会逐渐到达，这需要定期增强学习模型。对新类别的微调通常会导致旧类别的表现不佳，这被称为“灾难性遗忘”。现有的解决方案要么从头开始重新训练模型，要么需要在训练期间重播旧样本。本文提出了一种基于相互蒸馏的完整在线深度度量学习框架，适用于单任务和多任务场景。与师生框架不同，所提出的方法同等重视新旧学习任务。不会产生对旧知识或新知识的偏好。此外，还提出了一种新颖的虚拟特征估计方法来恢复旧模型提取的特征。它允许新旧模型之间的蒸馏，而无需重放旧训练样本或在训练期间保留旧模型。一项全面的研究表明，在不同骨干的支持下，我们的方法具有卓越的性能。 本文提出了一种基于相互蒸馏的在线深度度量学习框架，用于处理增量新类别时避免灾难性遗忘问题。 Gao-Dong Liu,Wan-Lei Zhao,Jie Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Yun Xiang,Qijun Chen,Zhongjin Su,Lu Zhang,Zuohui Chen,Guozhi Zhou,Zhuping Yao,Qi Xuan,Yuan Cheng
title: Hyperspectral Imaging for cherry tomato
title_zh: 樱桃番茄的高光谱成像
abstract: Cherry tomato (Solanum Lycopersicum) is popular with consumers over the world due to its special flavor. Soluble solids content (SSC) and firmness are two key metrics for evaluating the product qualities. In this work, we develop non-destructive testing techniques for SSC and fruit firmness based on hyperspectral images and a corresponding deep learning regression model. Hyperspectral reflectance images of over 200 tomato fruits are derived with spectrum ranging from 400 to 1000 nm. The acquired hyperspectral images are corrected and the spectral information is extracted. A novel one-dimensional(1D) convolutional ResNet (Con1dResNet) based regression model is prosed and compared with the state of art techniques. Experimental results show that, with a relatively large number of samples our technique is 26.4\% better than state of art technique for SSC and 33.7\% for firmness. The results of this study indicate the application potential of hyperspectral imaging technique in the SSC and firmness detection, which provides a new option for non-destructive testing of cherry tomato fruit quality in the future.
summary: Cherry tomato (Solanum Lycopersicum) is popular with consumers over the world due to its special flavor. Soluble solids content (SSC) and firmness are two key metrics for evaluating the product qualities. In this work, we develop non-destructive testing techniques for SSC and fruit firmness based on hyperspectral images and a corresponding deep learning regression model. Hyperspectral reflectance images of over 200 tomato fruits are derived with spectrum ranging from 400 to 1000 nm. The acquired hyperspectral images are corrected and the spectral information is extracted. A novel one-dimensional(1D) convolutional ResNet (Con1dResNet) based regression model is prosed and compared with the state of art techniques. Experimental results show that, with a relatively large number of samples our technique is 26.4\% better than state of art technique for SSC and 33.7\% for firmness. The results of this study indicate the application potential of hyperspectral imaging technique in the SSC and firmness detection, which provides a new option for non-destructive testing of cherry tomato fruit quality in the future.
abstract_zh: 樱桃番茄（Solanum Lycopersicum）因其特殊的风味深受世界各地消费者的喜爱。可溶性固形物含量（SSC）和硬度是评估产品质量的两个关键指标。在这项工作中，我们开发了基于高光谱图像和相应的深度学习回归模型的 SSC 和水果硬度的无损检测技术。获得了 200 多个番茄果实的高光谱反射图像，光谱范围为 400 至 1000 nm。对获取的高光谱图像进行校正并提取光谱信息。提出了一种新颖的一维 (1D) 卷积 ResNet (Con1dResNet) 回归模型，并与最先进的技术进行了比较。实验结果表明，在样本数量相对较多的情况下，我们的技术在 SSC 方面比现有技术好 26.4%，在硬度方面比现有技术好 33.7%。本研究结果表明高光谱成像技术在SSC和硬度检测中的应用潜力，为未来樱桃番茄果实品质的无损检测提供了新的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高光谱成像和深度学习回归模型的非破坏性检测方法，用于测定樱桃番茄的可溶性固形物含量（SSC）和果实硬度。
AI.motivation: 樱桃番茄的品质评估需要关键指标SSC和硬度，传统检测方法具有破坏性，需开发非破坏性检测技术以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 采集200余枚番茄的400-1000nm高光谱反射图像，进行校正和光谱特征提取，提出基于1D卷积ResNet（Con1dResNet）的回归模型，并与现有技术对比验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在SSC检测上比现有技术提升26.4%，硬度检测提升33.7%。
AI.conclusion: 高光谱成像技术在樱桃番茄品质检测中具有应用潜力，为未来非破坏性检测提供了新方案。

search_text: Hyperspectral Imaging for cherry tomato 樱桃番茄的高光谱成像 Cherry tomato (Solanum Lycopersicum) is popular with consumers over the world due to its special flavor. Soluble solids content (SSC) and firmness are two key metrics for evaluating the product qualities. In this work, we develop non-destructive testing techniques for SSC and fruit firmness based on hyperspectral images and a corresponding deep learning regression model. Hyperspectral reflectance images of over 200 tomato fruits are derived with spectrum ranging from 400 to 1000 nm. The acquired hyperspectral images are corrected and the spectral information is extracted. A novel one-dimensional(1D) convolutional ResNet (Con1dResNet) based regression model is prosed and compared with the state of art techniques. Experimental results show that, with a relatively large number of samples our technique is 26.4\% better than state of art technique for SSC and 33.7\% for firmness. The results of this study indicate the application potential of hyperspectral imaging technique in the SSC and firmness detection, which provides a new option for non-destructive testing of cherry tomato fruit quality in the future. 樱桃番茄（Solanum Lycopersicum）因其特殊的风味深受世界各地消费者的喜爱。可溶性固形物含量（SSC）和硬度是评估产品质量的两个关键指标。在这项工作中，我们开发了基于高光谱图像和相应的深度学习回归模型的 SSC 和水果硬度的无损检测技术。获得了 200 多个番茄果实的高光谱反射图像，光谱范围为 400 至 1000 nm。对获取的高光谱图像进行校正并提取光谱信息。提出了一种新颖的一维 (1D) 卷积 ResNet (Con1dResNet) 回归模型，并与最先进的技术进行了比较。实验结果表明，在样本数量相对较多的情况下，我们的技术在 SSC 方面比现有技术好 26.4%，在硬度方面比现有技术好 33.7%。本研究结果表明高光谱成像技术在SSC和硬度检测中的应用潜力，为未来樱桃番茄果实品质的无损检测提供了新的选择。 本文提出了一种基于高光谱成像和深度学习回归模型的非破坏性检测方法，用于测定樱桃番茄的可溶性固形物含量（SSC）和果实硬度。 Yun Xiang,Qijun Chen,Zhongjin Su,Lu Zhang,Zuohui Chen,Guozhi Zhou,Zhuping Yao,Qi Xuan,Yuan Cheng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sulong Ge,Zhihua Xia,Yao Tong,Jian Weng,Jianan Liu
title: A Screen-Shooting Resilient Document Image Watermarking Scheme using Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 一种基于深度神经网络的屏幕截图弹性文档图像水印方案
abstract: With the advent of the screen-reading era, the confidential documents displayed on the screen can be easily captured by a camera without leaving any traces. Thus, this paper proposes a novel screen-shooting resilient watermarking scheme for document image using deep neural network. By applying this scheme, when the watermarked image is displayed on the screen and captured by a camera, the watermark can be still extracted from the captured photographs. Specifically, our scheme is an end-to-end neural network with an encoder to embed watermark and a decoder to extract watermark. During the training process, a distortion layer between encoder and decoder is added to simulate the distortions introduced by screen-shooting process in real scenes, such as camera distortion, shooting distortion, light source distortion. Besides, an embedding strength adjustment strategy is designed to improve the visual quality of the watermarked image with little loss of extraction accuracy. The experimental results show that the scheme has higher robustness and visual quality than other three recent state-of-the-arts. Specially, even if the shooting distances and angles are in extreme, our scheme can also obtain high extraction accuracy.
summary: With the advent of the screen-reading era, the confidential documents displayed on the screen can be easily captured by a camera without leaving any traces. Thus, this paper proposes a novel screen-shooting resilient watermarking scheme for document image using deep neural network. By applying this scheme, when the watermarked image is displayed on the screen and captured by a camera, the watermark can be still extracted from the captured photographs. Specifically, our scheme is an end-to-end neural network with an encoder to embed watermark and a decoder to extract watermark. During the training process, a distortion layer between encoder and decoder is added to simulate the distortions introduced by screen-shooting process in real scenes, such as camera distortion, shooting distortion, light source distortion. Besides, an embedding strength adjustment strategy is designed to improve the visual quality of the watermarked image with little loss of extraction accuracy. The experimental results show that the scheme has higher robustness and visual quality than other three recent state-of-the-arts. Specially, even if the shooting distances and angles are in extreme, our scheme can also obtain high extraction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 随着屏幕阅读时代的到来，屏幕上显示的机密文件可以很容易地被相机捕获，不留任何痕迹。因此，本文提出了一种使用深度神经网络的文档图像屏幕拍摄弹性水印方案。通过应用该方案，当带水印的图像显示在屏幕上并被相机捕获时，仍然可以从捕获的照片中提取水印。具体来说，我们的方案是一个端到端的神经网络，带有用于嵌入水印的编码器和用于提取水印的解码器。在训练过程中，在编码器和解码器之间添加了一个畸变层，以模拟真实场景中屏幕拍摄过程引入的畸变，如相机畸变、拍摄畸变、光源畸变等。此外，还设计了嵌入强度调整策略来提高水印图像的视觉质量，同时提取精度损失很小。实验结果表明，该方案比其他三种最新技术具有更高的鲁棒性和视觉质量。特别是，即使拍摄距离和角度极端，我们的方案也可以获得很高的提取精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的屏幕截图鲁棒文档图像水印方案，能够在图像被屏幕拍摄后仍有效提取水印。
AI.motivation: 屏幕显示的机密文档易被相机拍摄导致水印失效，现有方案难以应对屏幕拍摄引入的多种失真问题。
AI.method: 构建端到端神经网络，包含嵌入水印的编码器和提取水印的解码器，训练时加入模拟屏幕拍摄失真的扰动层，并设计嵌入强度调整策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方案在鲁棒性和视觉质量上优于三种最新方法，极端拍摄距离和角度下仍保持高提取准确率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度学习水印方案有效解决了屏幕截图场景下的水印鲁棒性问题，适用于屏幕显示文档的版权保护。

search_text: A Screen-Shooting Resilient Document Image Watermarking Scheme using Deep Neural Network 一种基于深度神经网络的屏幕截图弹性文档图像水印方案 With the advent of the screen-reading era, the confidential documents displayed on the screen can be easily captured by a camera without leaving any traces. Thus, this paper proposes a novel screen-shooting resilient watermarking scheme for document image using deep neural network. By applying this scheme, when the watermarked image is displayed on the screen and captured by a camera, the watermark can be still extracted from the captured photographs. Specifically, our scheme is an end-to-end neural network with an encoder to embed watermark and a decoder to extract watermark. During the training process, a distortion layer between encoder and decoder is added to simulate the distortions introduced by screen-shooting process in real scenes, such as camera distortion, shooting distortion, light source distortion. Besides, an embedding strength adjustment strategy is designed to improve the visual quality of the watermarked image with little loss of extraction accuracy. The experimental results show that the scheme has higher robustness and visual quality than other three recent state-of-the-arts. Specially, even if the shooting distances and angles are in extreme, our scheme can also obtain high extraction accuracy. 随着屏幕阅读时代的到来，屏幕上显示的机密文件可以很容易地被相机捕获，不留任何痕迹。因此，本文提出了一种使用深度神经网络的文档图像屏幕拍摄弹性水印方案。通过应用该方案，当带水印的图像显示在屏幕上并被相机捕获时，仍然可以从捕获的照片中提取水印。具体来说，我们的方案是一个端到端的神经网络，带有用于嵌入水印的编码器和用于提取水印的解码器。在训练过程中，在编码器和解码器之间添加了一个畸变层，以模拟真实场景中屏幕拍摄过程引入的畸变，如相机畸变、拍摄畸变、光源畸变等。此外，还设计了嵌入强度调整策略来提高水印图像的视觉质量，同时提取精度损失很小。实验结果表明，该方案比其他三种最新技术具有更高的鲁棒性和视觉质量。特别是，即使拍摄距离和角度极端，我们的方案也可以获得很高的提取精度。 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的屏幕截图鲁棒文档图像水印方案，能够在图像被屏幕拍摄后仍有效提取水印。 Sulong Ge,Zhihua Xia,Yao Tong,Jian Weng,Jianan Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Yunus Parvej Faniband,Iskandar Ishak,Sadiq M. Sait
title: A Review of Open Source Software Tools for Time Series Analysis
title_zh: 用于时间序列分析的开源软件工具回顾
abstract: Time series data is used in a wide range of real world applications. In a variety of domains , detailed analysis of time series data (via Forecasting and Anomaly Detection) leads to a better understanding of how events associated with a specific time instance behave. Time Series Analysis (TSA) is commonly performed with plots and traditional models. Machine Learning (ML) approaches , on the other hand , have seen an increase in the state of the art for Forecasting and Anomaly Detection because they provide comparable results when time and data constraints are met. A number of time series toolboxes are available that offer rich interfaces to specific model classes (ARIMA/filters , neural networks) or framework interfaces to isolated time series modelling tasks (forecasting , feature extraction , annotation , classification). Nonetheless , open source machine learning capabilities for time series remain limited , and existing libraries are frequently incompatible with one another. The goal of this paper is to provide a concise and user friendly overview of the most important open source tools for time series analysis. This article examines two related toolboxes (1) forecasting and (2) anomaly detection. This paper describes a typical Time Series Analysis (TSA) framework with an architecture and lists the main features of TSA framework. The tools are categorized based on the criteria of analysis tasks completed , data preparation methods employed , and evaluation methods for results generated. This paper presents quantitative analysis and discusses the current state of actively developed open source Time Series Analysis frameworks. Overall , this article considered 60 time series analysis tools , and 32 of which provided forecasting modules , and 21 packages included anomaly detection.

abstract_zh: 时间序列数据广泛应用于现实世界。在各种领域中，对时间序列数据的详细分析（通过预测和异常检测）可以更好地理解与特定时间实例相关的事件的行为方式。时间序列分析 (TSA) 通常使用绘图和传统模型进行。另一方面，机器学习 (ML) 方法在预测和异常检测方面的技术水平不断提高，因为它们在满足时间和数据限制时提供了可比较的结果。有许多时间序列工具箱可供使用，它们为特定模型类（ARIMA/过滤器、神经网络）提供丰富的接口，或为隔离时间序列建模任务（预测、特征提取、注释、分类）提供框架接口。尽管如此，时间序列的开源机器学习功能仍然有限，并且现有库经常相互不兼容。本文的目标是对时间序列分析最重要的开源工具提供简洁且用户友好的概述。本文研究了两个相关的工具箱（1）预测和（2）异常检测。本文描述了一个典型的时间序列分析（TSA）框架及其架构，并列出了TSA框架的主要特征。这些工具根据完成的分析任务的标准、采用的数据准备方法以及生成的结果的评估方法进行分类。本文介绍了定量分析并讨论了积极开发的开源时间序列分析框架的现状。总的来说，本文考虑了 60 个时间序列分析工具，其中 32 个提供预测模块，21 个软件包包含异常检测。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了60个时间序列分析领域的开源工具，重点评估了其在预测和异常检测方面的功能与兼容性。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习在时间序列分析中表现突出，但现有开源工具存在功能碎片化、接口不兼容等问题，需系统性梳理以辅助用户选择。
AI.method: 通过架构分析、功能分类（任务类型/数据预处理/评估方法）及量化比较，对工具进行系统性归类与评估。
AI.result: 共筛选出60个工具，其中32个支持预测模块，21个包含异常检测功能，揭示了当前开源框架的发展现状与局限性。
AI.conclusion: 开源时间序列分析工具生态需加强标准化与兼容性，未来应推动跨框架整合与功能扩展。

search_text: A Review of Open Source Software Tools for Time Series Analysis 用于时间序列分析的开源软件工具回顾 Time series data is used in a wide range of real world applications. In a variety of domains , detailed analysis of time series data (via Forecasting and Anomaly Detection) leads to a better understanding of how events associated with a specific time instance behave. Time Series Analysis (TSA) is commonly performed with plots and traditional models. Machine Learning (ML) approaches , on the other hand , have seen an increase in the state of the art for Forecasting and Anomaly Detection because they provide comparable results when time and data constraints are met. A number of time series toolboxes are available that offer rich interfaces to specific model classes (ARIMA/filters , neural networks) or framework interfaces to isolated time series modelling tasks (forecasting , feature extraction , annotation , classification). Nonetheless , open source machine learning capabilities for time series remain limited , and existing libraries are frequently incompatible with one another. The goal of this paper is to provide a concise and user friendly overview of the most important open source tools for time series analysis. This article examines two related toolboxes (1) forecasting and (2) anomaly detection. This paper describes a typical Time Series Analysis (TSA) framework with an architecture and lists the main features of TSA framework. The tools are categorized based on the criteria of analysis tasks completed , data preparation methods employed , and evaluation methods for results generated. This paper presents quantitative analysis and discusses the current state of actively developed open source Time Series Analysis frameworks. Overall , this article considered 60 time series analysis tools , and 32 of which provided forecasting modules , and 21 packages included anomaly detection. 时间序列数据广泛应用于现实世界。在各种领域中，对时间序列数据的详细分析（通过预测和异常检测）可以更好地理解与特定时间实例相关的事件的行为方式。时间序列分析 (TSA) 通常使用绘图和传统模型进行。另一方面，机器学习 (ML) 方法在预测和异常检测方面的技术水平不断提高，因为它们在满足时间和数据限制时提供了可比较的结果。有许多时间序列工具箱可供使用，它们为特定模型类（ARIMA/过滤器、神经网络）提供丰富的接口，或为隔离时间序列建模任务（预测、特征提取、注释、分类）提供框架接口。尽管如此，时间序列的开源机器学习功能仍然有限，并且现有库经常相互不兼容。本文的目标是对时间序列分析最重要的开源工具提供简洁且用户友好的概述。本文研究了两个相关的工具箱（1）预测和（2）异常检测。本文描述了一个典型的时间序列分析（TSA）框架及其架构，并列出了TSA框架的主要特征。这些工具根据完成的分析任务的标准、采用的数据准备方法以及生成的结果的评估方法进行分类。本文介绍了定量分析并讨论了积极开发的开源时间序列分析框架的现状。总的来说，本文考虑了 60 个时间序列分析工具，其中 32 个提供预测模块，21 个软件包包含异常检测。 本文综述了60个时间序列分析领域的开源工具，重点评估了其在预测和异常检测方面的功能与兼容性。 Yunus Parvej Faniband,Iskandar Ishak,Sadiq M. Sait cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuxiao Chen,Bike Zhang,Mark W. Mueller,Akshara Rai,Koushil Sreenath
title: Learning Torque Control for Quadrupedal Locomotion
title_zh: 学习四足运动的扭矩控制
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a promising approach to developing controllers for quadrupedal robots. Conventionally, an RL design for locomotion follows a position-based paradigm, wherein an RL policy outputs target joint positions at a low frequency that are then tracked by a high-frequency proportional-derivative (PD) controller to produce joint torques. In contrast, for the model-based control of quadrupedal locomotion, there has been a paradigm shift from position-based control to torque-based control. In light of the recent advances in model-based control, we explore an alternative to the position-based RL paradigm, by introducing a torque-based RL framework, where an RL policy directly predicts joint torques at a high frequency, thus circumventing the use of a PD controller. The proposed learning torque control framework is validated with extensive experiments, in which a quadruped is capable of traversing various terrain and resisting external disturbances while following user-specified commands. Furthermore, compared to learning position control, learning torque control demonstrates the potential to achieve a higher reward and is more robust to significant external disturbances. To our knowledge, this is the first sim-to-real attempt for end-to-end learning torque control of quadrupedal locomotion.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a promising approach to developing controllers for quadrupedal robots. Conventionally, an RL design for locomotion follows a position-based paradigm, wherein an RL policy outputs target joint positions at a low frequency that are then tracked by a high-frequency proportional-derivative (PD) controller to produce joint torques. In contrast, for the model-based control of quadrupedal locomotion, there has been a paradigm shift from position-based control to torque-based control. In light of the recent advances in model-based control, we explore an alternative to the position-based RL paradigm, by introducing a torque-based RL framework, where an RL policy directly predicts joint torques at a high frequency, thus circumventing the use of a PD controller. The proposed learning torque control framework is validated with extensive experiments, in which a quadruped is capable of traversing various terrain and resisting external disturbances while following user-specified commands. Furthermore, compared to learning position control, learning torque control demonstrates the potential to achieve a higher reward and is more robust to significant external disturbances. To our knowledge, this is the first sim-to-real attempt for end-to-end learning torque control of quadrupedal locomotion.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为开发四足机器人控制器的一种有前途的方法。传统上，用于运动的强化学习设计遵循基于位置的范例，其中强化学习策略以低频输出目标关节位置，然后由高频比例微分 (PD) 控制器跟踪以产生关节扭矩。相比之下，对于四足运动的基于模型的控制，已经发生了从基于位置的控制到基于扭矩的控制的范式转变。鉴于基于模型的控制的最新进展，我们通过引入基于扭矩的 RL 框架，探索基于位置的 RL 范式的替代方案，其中 RL 策略直接预测高频关节扭矩，从而绕过 PD 控制器的使用。所提出的学习扭矩控制框架经过大量实验的验证，其中四足动物能够穿越各种地形并抵抗外部干扰，同时遵循用户指定的命令。此外，与学习位置控制相比，学习扭矩控制表现出获得更高回报的潜力，并且对显着的外部干扰更加鲁棒。据我们所知，这是对四足运动端到端学习扭矩控制的首次模拟到真实的尝试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的扭矩控制框架，用于四足机器人运动控制，直接预测关节扭矩以替代传统的位置控制方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于位置的强化学习方法依赖PD控制器生成扭矩，存在响应延迟和鲁棒性不足的问题。模型预测控制已转向扭矩控制，但端到端学习扭矩控制的研究尚属空白。
AI.method: 设计直接输出高频关节扭矩的强化学习策略，绕过PD控制器，通过仿真到实物的实验验证其在复杂地形和外部扰动下的性能。
AI.result: 四足机器人能够稳定穿越多种地形并抵抗外部干扰，扭矩控制相比位置控制获得更高奖励且鲁棒性更优，实现了首个仿真到实物的端到端扭矩控制学习。
AI.conclusion: 扭矩控制框架在运动性能和抗干扰能力上优于传统方法，为四足机器人控制提供了新的研究方向和工程实现路径。

authors_text: Jinlin Liu
title: Adaptive Background Matting Using Background Matching
title_zh: 使用背景匹配的自适应背景抠图
abstract: Due to the difficulty of solving the matting problem, lots of methods use some kinds of assistance to acquire high quality alpha matte. Green screen matting methods rely on physical equipment. Trimap-based methods take manual interactions as external input. Background-based methods require a pre-captured, static background. The methods are not flexible and convenient enough to use widely. Trimap-free methods are flexible but not stable in complicated video applications. To be stable and flexible in real applications, we propose an adaptive background matting method. The user first captures their videos freely, moving the cameras. Then the user captures the background video afterwards, roughly covering the previous captured regions. We use dynamic background video instead of static background for accurate matting. The proposed method is convenient to use in any scenes as the static camera and background is no more the limitation. To achieve this goal, we use background matching network to find the best-matched background frame by frame from dynamic backgrounds. Then, robust semantic estimation network is used to estimate the coarse alpha matte. Finally, we crop and zoom the target region according to the coarse alpha matte, and estimate the final accurate alpha matte. In experiments, the proposed method is able to perform comparably against the state-of-the-art matting methods.
summary: Due to the difficulty of solving the matting problem, lots of methods use some kinds of assistance to acquire high quality alpha matte. Green screen matting methods rely on physical equipment. Trimap-based methods take manual interactions as external input. Background-based methods require a pre-captured, static background. The methods are not flexible and convenient enough to use widely. Trimap-free methods are flexible but not stable in complicated video applications. To be stable and flexible in real applications, we propose an adaptive background matting method. The user first captures their videos freely, moving the cameras. Then the user captures the background video afterwards, roughly covering the previous captured regions. We use dynamic background video instead of static background for accurate matting. The proposed method is convenient to use in any scenes as the static camera and background is no more the limitation. To achieve this goal, we use background matching network to find the best-matched background frame by frame from dynamic backgrounds. Then, robust semantic estimation network is used to estimate the coarse alpha matte. Finally, we crop and zoom the target region according to the coarse alpha matte, and estimate the final accurate alpha matte. In experiments, the proposed method is able to perform comparably against the state-of-the-art matting methods.
abstract_zh: 由于解决抠图问题的困难，许多方法使用某种辅助来获得高质量的阿尔法遮罩。绿幕抠图方法依赖于物理设备。基于 Trimap 的方法将手动交互作为外部输入。基于背景的方法需要预先捕获的静态背景。这些方法不够灵活、方便，不宜广泛使用。无 Trimap 方法很灵活，但在复杂的视频应用中不稳定。为了在实际应用中保持稳定和灵活，我们提出了一种自适应背景抠图方法。用户首先通过移动相机自由捕捉视频。然后用户随后捕获背景视频，大致覆盖之前捕获的区域。我们使用动态背景视频而不是静态背景来进行准确的抠图。所提出的方法可以方便地在任何场景中使用，因为静态摄像机和背景不再是限制。为了实现这一目标，我们使用背景匹配网络从动态背景中逐帧找到最匹配的背景。然后，使用鲁棒语义估计网络来估计粗α遮罩。最后，我们根据粗略的 alpha 遮罩裁剪和缩放目标区域，并估计最终的准确的 alpha 遮罩。在实验中，所提出的方法能够与最先进的抠图方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于背景匹配的自适应背景抠图方法，利用动态背景视频替代静态背景以提高抠图精度。
AI.motivation: 传统抠图方法依赖静态背景或人工交互，灵活性和稳定性不足，难以适应复杂视频场景。
AI.method: 通过背景匹配网络逐帧匹配动态背景，结合语义估计网络生成粗略alpha图，再裁剪目标区域得到精确alpha图。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在性能上可与现有最先进的抠图方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了静态场景限制，实现了更便捷稳定的实时抠图应用。

Then, robust semantic estimation network is used to estimate the coarse alpha matte. Finally, we crop and zoom the target region according to the coarse alpha matte, and estimate the final accurate alpha matte. In experiments, the proposed method is able to perform comparably against the state-of-the-art matting methods. 由于解决抠图问题的困难，许多方法使用某种辅助来获得高质量的阿尔法遮罩。绿幕抠图方法依赖于物理设备。基于 Trimap 的方法将手动交互作为外部输入。基于背景的方法需要预先捕获的静态背景。这些方法不够灵活、方便，不宜广泛使用。无 Trimap 方法很灵活，但在复杂的视频应用中不稳定。为了在实际应用中保持稳定和灵活，我们提出了一种自适应背景抠图方法。用户首先通过移动相机自由捕捉视频。然后用户随后捕获背景视频，大致覆盖之前捕获的区域。我们使用动态背景视频而不是静态背景来进行准确的抠图。所提出的方法可以方便地在任何场景中使用，因为静态摄像机和背景不再是限制。为了实现这一目标，我们使用背景匹配网络从动态背景中逐帧找到最匹配的背景。然后，使用鲁棒语义估计网络来估计粗α遮罩。最后，我们根据粗略的 alpha 遮罩裁剪和缩放目标区域，并估计最终的准确的 alpha 遮罩。在实验中，所提出的方法能够与最先进的抠图方法相媲美。 本文提出了一种基于背景匹配的自适应背景抠图方法，利用动态背景视频替代静态背景以提高抠图精度。 Jinlin Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Mustain Billah,Sk. Tanzir Mehedi,Adnan Anwar,Ziaur Rahman,Rafiqul Islam
title: A Systematic Literature Review on Blockchain Enabled Federated Learning Framework for Internet of Vehicles
title_zh: 区块链车联网联邦学习框架系统文献综述
abstract: While the convergence of Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques with improved information technology systems ensured enormous benefits to the Internet of Vehicles (IoVs) systems, it also introduced an increased amount of security and privacy threats. To ensure the security of IoVs data, privacy preservation methodologies have gained significant attention in the literature. However, these strategies also need specific adjustments and modifications to cope with the advances in IoVs design. In the interim, Federated Learning (FL) has been proven as an emerging idea to protect IoVs data privacy and security. On the other hand, Blockchain technology is showing prominent possibilities with secured, dispersed, and auditable data recording and sharing schemes. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey on the application and implementation of Blockchain-Enabled Federated Learning frameworks for IoVs. Besides, probable issues, challenges, solutions, and future research directions for BC-Enabled FL frameworks for IoVs are also presented. This survey can further be used as the basis for developing modern BC-Enabled FL solutions to resolve different data privacy issues and scenarios of IoVs.
summary: While the convergence of Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques with improved information technology systems ensured enormous benefits to the Internet of Vehicles (IoVs) systems, it also introduced an increased amount of security and privacy threats. To ensure the security of IoVs data, privacy preservation methodologies have gained significant attention in the literature. However, these strategies also need specific adjustments and modifications to cope with the advances in IoVs design. In the interim, Federated Learning (FL) has been proven as an emerging idea to protect IoVs data privacy and security. On the other hand, Blockchain technology is showing prominent possibilities with secured, dispersed, and auditable data recording and sharing schemes. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey on the application and implementation of Blockchain-Enabled Federated Learning frameworks for IoVs. Besides, probable issues, challenges, solutions, and future research directions for BC-Enabled FL frameworks for IoVs are also presented. This survey can further be used as the basis for developing modern BC-Enabled FL solutions to resolve different data privacy issues and scenarios of IoVs.
abstract_zh: 虽然人工智能（AI）技术与改进的信息技术系统的融合为车联网（IoV）系统带来了巨大的好处，但它也带来了越来越多的安全和隐私威胁。为了确保车联网数据的安全，隐私保护方法在文献中受到了广泛关注。然而，这些策略还需要具体的调整和修改，以应对车联网设计的进步。在此期间，联邦学习（FL）已被证明是保护车联网数据隐私和安全的新兴理念。另一方面，区块链技术在安全、分散和可审计的数据记录和共享方案方面显示出显着的可能性。在本文中，我们对基于区块链的车联网联合学习框架的应用和实施进行了全面调查。此外，还介绍了支持 BC 的车联网 FL 框架的可能问题、挑战、解决方案和未来研究方向。这项调查还可以作为开发现代 BC-Enabled FL 解决方案的基础，以解决车联网的不同数据隐私问题和场景。

AI.tldr: 本文对区块链赋能的联邦学习框架在车联网（IoVs）中的应用进行了系统综述，探讨了其挑战、解决方案及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 车联网系统在融合人工智能技术时面临数据隐私和安全威胁，需通过区块链与联邦学习结合来增强数据保护能力。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，分析区块链与联邦学习框架在IoVs中的现有研究、技术挑战及潜在解决方案。
AI.result: 总结了区块链赋能联邦学习在IoVs中的关键应用场景、技术挑战（如延迟、可扩展性）及当前研究的不足。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为未来设计高效、安全的区块链-联邦学习框架提供了理论基础与研究方向，以应对车联网的数据隐私问题。

authors_text: Yinhuai Wang,Shuzhou Yang,Yujie Hu,Jian Zhang
title: NeRFocus: Neural Radiance Field for 3D Synthetic Defocus
title_zh: NeRFocus：用于 3D 合成散焦的神经辐射场
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) bring a new wave for 3D interactive experiences. However, as an important part of the immersive experiences, the defocus effects have not been fully explored within NeRF. Some recent NeRF-based methods generate 3D defocus effects in a post-process fashion by utilizing multiplane technology. Still, they are either time-consuming or memory-consuming. This paper proposes a novel thin-lens-imaging-based NeRF framework that can directly render various 3D defocus effects, dubbed NeRFocus. Unlike the pinhole, the thin lens refracts rays of a scene point, so its imaging on the sensor plane is scattered as a circle of confusion (CoC). A direct solution sampling enough rays to approximate this process is computationally expensive. Instead, we propose to inverse the thin lens imaging to explicitly model the beam path for each point on the sensor plane and generalize this paradigm to the beam path of each pixel, then use the frustum-based volume rendering to render each pixel's beam path. We further design an efficient probabilistic training (p-training) strategy to simplify the training process vastly. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our NeRFocus can achieve various 3D defocus effects with adjustable camera pose, focus distance, and aperture size. Existing NeRF can be regarded as our special case by setting aperture size as zero to render large depth-of-field images. Despite such merits, NeRFocus does not sacrifice NeRF's original performance (e.g., training and inference time, parameter consumption, rendering quality), which implies its great potential for broader application and further improvement. Code and video are available at https://github.com/wyhuai/NeRFocus.
summary: Neural radiance fields (NeRF) bring a new wave for 3D interactive experiences. However, as an important part of the immersive experiences, the defocus effects have not been fully explored within NeRF. Some recent NeRF-based methods generate 3D defocus effects in a post-process fashion by utilizing multiplane technology. Still, they are either time-consuming or memory-consuming. This paper proposes a novel thin-lens-imaging-based NeRF framework that can directly render various 3D defocus effects, dubbed NeRFocus. Unlike the pinhole, the thin lens refracts rays of a scene point, so its imaging on the sensor plane is scattered as a circle of confusion (CoC). A direct solution sampling enough rays to approximate this process is computationally expensive. Instead, we propose to inverse the thin lens imaging to explicitly model the beam path for each point on the sensor plane and generalize this paradigm to the beam path of each pixel, then use the frustum-based volume rendering to render each pixel's beam path. We further design an efficient probabilistic training (p-training) strategy to simplify the training process vastly. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our NeRFocus can achieve various 3D defocus effects with adjustable camera pose, focus distance, and aperture size. Existing NeRF can be regarded as our special case by setting aperture size as zero to render large depth-of-field images. Despite such merits, NeRFocus does not sacrifice NeRF's original performance (e.g., training and inference time, parameter consumption, rendering quality), which implies its great potential for broader application and further improvement. Code and video are available at https://github.com/wyhuai/NeRFocus.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 带来了 3D 交互体验的新浪潮。然而，作为沉浸式体验的重要组成部分，散焦效果在 NeRF 中尚未得到充分探索。最近一些基于 NeRF 的方法利用多平面技术以后处理方式生成 3D 散焦效果。尽管如此，它们要么消耗时间，要么消耗内存。本文提出了一种基于薄透镜成像的新型 NeRF 框架，可以直接渲染各种 3D 散焦效果，称为 NeRFocus。与针孔不同，薄透镜会折射场景点的光线，因此其在传感器平面上的成像会以弥散圆 (CoC) 形式散射。直接采样足够的光线来近似该过程的解决方案在计算上是昂贵的。相反，我们建议反转薄透镜成像，以明确地模拟传感器平面上每个点的光束路径，并将这种范例推广到每个像素的光束路径，然后使用基于平截头体的体积渲染来渲染每个像素的光束路径。我们进一步设计了一种有效的概率训练（p-training）策略来极大地简化训练过程。大量实验表明，我们的 NeRFocus 可以通过调整相机姿态、焦距和光圈大小来实现各种 3D 散焦效果。现有的 NeRF 可以被视为我们的特例，通过将孔径大小设置为零来渲染大景深图像。尽管有这些优点，NeRFocus 并没有牺牲 NeRF 的原始性能（例如训练和推理时间、参数消耗、渲染质量），这意味着它具有更广泛应用和进一步改进的巨大潜力。代码和视频可在 https://github.com/wyhuai/NeRFocus 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeRFocus，一种基于薄透镜成像的神经辐射场框架，可直接渲染多种3D虚焦效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF的虚焦方法存在计算或内存消耗大的问题，需开发更高效的3D虚焦渲染方案。
AI.method: 通过逆向薄透镜成像建模传感器平面光束路径，结合概率训练策略与基于视锥体的体积渲染技术。
AI.result: 实现可调节参数的3D虚焦效果，保持原NeRF性能指标，且传统NeRF可视为其特殊情形。
AI.conclusion: NeRFocus在不牺牲性能的前提下拓展了NeRF应用潜力，为后续改进提供新方向。
